Japanese: さあ、お待たせしましたァッ！
English: Ladies and Gentlemen! Boys and Girls! Welcome to the show!

Japanese: ‥‥本日最後のだしものは‥‥ 《奇跡の空中飛翔》！
English: Prepare to witness a man who has mastered the wonder of flight...

Japanese: 今世紀最高の大魔術師‥‥
English: The World's Greatest Magician...

Japanese: その名もマキシミリアーン ‥‥ギャラクティカァッ！‥‥
English: The one... The only...
Maximillion Galactica!

Japanese: １２月２６日　午後　８時１２分 タチミ・サーカス　テント前
English: December 26, 8:12 PM Berry Big Circus Circus Entrance

Japanese: ‥‥はあ。 ユメのようなヒトトキでした‥‥。
English: Wow... That was like living a dream...

Japanese: まだ、ムネがどきどき しています。
English: I haven't even caught my breath yet.

Japanese: ね。ね。スゴかったでしょ はみちゃん！
English: Hehe... That was amazing! Wasn't it Pearly!?

Japanese: はい、それはもう！ ‥‥おウマさんはダンスをするし、
English: It was great! There was a dancing bear...

Japanese: トラさんは炎の輪をくぐり、 ゾウさんは大きなマリに乗り、
English: And a tiger that jumped though a ring of fire... An elephant who rode a giant ball...

Japanese: あげくのはてに、殿方がお空を 飛びまわる始末。
English: Not to mention that guy who flew through the air!

Japanese: でしょ。でしょ。カッコイイよね！ マックス・ギャラクティカ。
English: Yeah! Max Galactica! He was absolutely fabulous!

Japanese: ‥‥はい？　なんですか？ まっくす‥‥
English: Huh? ...What? Max...

Japanese: マックス・ギャラクティカ。 今世紀最高の魔術師。
English: Max Galactica! The World's Greatest Magician!

Japanese: まじゅつし？
English: A magic-ician?

Japanese: そうだよ。
English: No, a magician.

Japanese: あの。なるほどくん。
English: Umm... Mr. Nick.

Japanese: ん？　なに？　春美ちゃん。
English: Huh? What is it Pearls?

Japanese: ‥‥それは霊媒師とは、いかなる 関係にあたるのでしょうか？
English: Does magic have anything to do with channeling spirits?

Japanese: （‥‥いかなるカンケーにも あたらないと思うけど‥‥）
English: (I don't think it has anything to do with channeling...)

Japanese: ‥‥もしかして、 知らないの？　魔術師。
English: You don't know about magic, do you Pearls?

Japanese: もうしわけありません‥‥。
English: I'm sorry...

Japanese: （倉院の里の事件から、半年‥‥）
English: (I braved the winter cold and took Pearls to see the circus...)

Japanese: （年末の寒空の下、春美ちゃんを つれてサーカス見物に来てみた）
English: (It's been six months since the incident in Kurain Village...)

Japanese: （春美ちゃんに会うのは あの事件以来だけど‥‥）
English: (It was during that terrible time that I met Pearls...)

Japanese: （‥‥がんばってるみたいだ。 日常を取りもどそうとして）
English: (It seems like she is starting to get back to normal...)

Japanese: ‥‥あ。 そろそろ行かないと。
English: Ahh... It's time to go.

Japanese: そうですね。 電車がなくなってしまいます。
English: You're right. We can't miss the last train.

Japanese: お。春美ちゃん、 おぼえたんだ。“電車”。
English: Pearls! You remembered the train!

Japanese: もちろんです！
English: Of course I did!

Japanese: ‥‥まだ、“とっきゅう”という 仕組みがよく、わかりませんけど。
English: But I don't really understand what everyone means by "express train".

Japanese: じゃ、なるほどくん。 また、来年ね。
English: Well, Nick... See you later.

Japanese: 事務所の大そうじ、 きちんとやるんだよ！
English: I'll come by to help clean the office. It's gotta be spotless for the New Year.

Japanese: ああ。だいじょうぶだよ。
English: Don't worry about it. Really.

Japanese: あの。よろしいのですか？ 真宵さま。
English: You are going to visit Mr. Nick on New Year's?

Japanese: え。
English: Maybe.

Japanese: せっかくですから、いとしい ヒトと、ふたりきりのお正月を‥‥
English: I am glad you will get to spend your New Year's with your special someone!

Japanese: も、もう！ ホラ、行くよ！　はみちゃん！
English: P-PEARL!! Look! It's time to go!

Japanese: あ。それではなるほどくん。 よいお年を。
English: Happy New Year Mr. Nick!

Japanese: （“よいお年を”か‥‥）
English: ("Happy New Year"...)

Japanese: （ホント、 そうなるといいよな‥‥）
English: (I really hope it will turn out that way...)

Japanese: １２月２８日　午前　９時１２分 成歩堂法律事務所
English: December 28, 9:12 AM Wright & Co. Law Offices

Japanese: （いちおう今日で 仕事おさめなんだけど‥‥）
English: (Well... Today wraps it up for this year...)

Japanese: （大そうじ、１日で終わるかな）
English: (I hope I can finish cleaning this place up in one day.)

Japanese: ‥‥はい。 成歩堂法律事務所で
English: ...Hello. This is the Wright & Co. Law Offices.

Japanese: なるほどくん！ たた、タイヘンだよっ！
English: Nick!! It's t-t-terrible!!

Japanese: お、真宵ちゃんか。 ちょうどいいところに。
English: Ahh, Maya. Perfect timing...

Japanese: じつは、 こっちもタイヘンなんだ。
English: Things are terrible here too!

Japanese: え。
English: Huh?

Japanese: いや、大そうじがね‥‥
English: The office is a terrible mess! And I have to clean it up!

Japanese: ナニ言ってるのッ！
English: What are you talking about!?

Japanese: ‥‥なんだよ、 そんなにコーフンして。
English: Umm... My dirty office. What are you talking about?

Japanese: いいからホラ、 テレビつける！　早く！
English: Listen Nick! You have to turn on the TV!
(The TV?)

Japanese: ‥‥ということで、さっそく 現場を呼び出してみましょう！
English: ...Now let's check in at the scene!

Japanese: （‥‥？ 何かあったのか‥‥）
English: (Huh? What happened...?)

Japanese: ‥‥はーい。こちらは タチミ・サーカス前でーす。
English: ...Thank you. We're here at the Berry Big Circus.

Japanese: サーカス以上にセンセーショナルな 殺人事件が起こった現場ですねー。
English: The Berry Big Circus has become the center of a sensational murder.

Japanese: もう、すんごいヤジウマ。 みなさん、盛り上がってますかー！
English: The scene has created quite a stir among the throngs of excited onlookers!

Japanese: タ‥‥タチミ・サーカスって‥‥
English: The Very... I mean... The Berry Big Circus...

Japanese: そう！　こないだ 見に行ったでしょ！　アレだよ！
English: That's the circus we went to!! Right!?

Japanese: 殺人事件‥‥って言ってるぞ。
English: They're saying that there was a... murder.

Japanese: そうなの！ タイホされちゃったの！
English: Yeah! They arrested him too!

Japanese: だ‥‥だれが？
English: A-Arrested who?

Japanese: マックスが！
English: Max!

Japanese: マックス・ギャラクティカが つかまっちゃったんだよおお！
English: They arrested Max Galactica!!

Japanese: （マキシミリアン・ギャラクティカ ‥‥通称、マックス）
English: (Maximillion Galactica. Fans call him Max.)

Japanese: （空中を自由に飛び回る 大魔術で人気のマジシャンだ）
English: (A popular magician who can fly through the sky at will...)

Japanese: （真宵ちゃんも大ファンだって 言ってたっけ‥‥）
English: (Maya said she was a huge fan of Max...)

Japanese: いいね、なるほどくん！ ２時間後、留置所前。
English: Alright Nick! I'll see you in two hours at the Detention Center.

Japanese: え？　な、何が。
English: Huh? What?

Japanese: 待ち合わせ。
English: See you there.

Japanese: ‥‥仕事おさめなんて、 いつでもできるでしょ！
English: You've still got plenty of time to clean up your office later!

Japanese: えええええっ！
English: W-WWWHHHAATTT!?

Japanese: 観葉植物のチャーリーくん。
English: Charley. A quite decorative plant.

Japanese: 年末の大そうじ、 こいつの手も借りたいぐらいだ。
English: I wouldn't mind his help cleaning this place up.

Japanese: ムズカシイ法律の本が あざ笑うように並んでいる。
English: Difficult-looking legal books stand in a formidable row. They mock me.

Japanese: 大そうじのついでに 古本屋に‥‥
English: I wouldn't mind dumping some of these off at the used bookstore...

Japanese: ‥‥ってワケにも いかないよな。
English: But that might not be such a good idea.

Japanese: 窓の向かいがわには、 巨大なビルがそびえている。
English: There is a giant building just outside the window.

Japanese: “ホテル・バンドー” ゴウカな高級ホテルだ。
English: It's the Gatewater Hotel, a high-class, luxury hotel.

Japanese: ちょっと前までは、ただの ビジネスホテルだったのに。
English: Until recently, it had been a normal, business-class hotel.

Japanese: ぼくのデスクだ。
English: My desk.

Japanese: あまり座る機会がないため、 いやにキチンとかたづいている。
English: Since I don't have time to sit, it's unusually clean...

Japanese: テレビのヒーロー “トノサマン”のポスター。
English: A poster of the newest member of the "Steel Samurai" universe.

Japanese: 最近、真宵ちゃんが 新しいものに張りかえた。
English: Maya went out and bought it right away. She's a sucker for all things Steel Samurai.

Japanese: “トノサマン”、ついに 映画化されたらしい。
English: I hear they're even giving the new guy his own movie.

Japanese: そのうち、真宵ちゃんに つきあわされそうだ‥‥。
English: I just know Maya is going to drag me out to see it with her...

Japanese: 同日　某時刻 成歩堂法律事務所
English: December 28 Wright & Co. Law Offices

Japanese: ‥‥さあ。調べることは いくらでもあるぞ！
English: Alright... We've got lots of things we have to look into.

Japanese: 休んでないで、行こうか。
English: No time for slacking. Let's get going.

Japanese: ‥‥うん。
English: OK.

Japanese: ？ なんだ、元気ないね。
English: What's the matter? You seem down.

Japanese: ‥‥日本人だったんだね‥‥ マックス。
English: Maximillion Galactica... Who would have guessed he was country bumpkin?

Japanese: どうしようか、これから。
English: So now what do we do?

Japanese: えー。まだ、たくさん することあるじゃない！
English: Huh? There's still lots of things we can do!

Japanese: 現場に行って、話を聞いて、 証拠を集めて‥‥。
English: Go to the scene of the crime, talk to witnesses, gather evidence...

Japanese: そうだなあ。
English: Yeah. I guess you're right.

Japanese: そもそも、どんな事件なのか、 まだよくわかってないし。
English: We still don't even know what happened in the first place.

Japanese: ‥‥うーん。何か推理するには、 まだデータが足りないな。
English: We don't have enough information to make a case yet.

Japanese: いつもそれだな。
English: I could have sworn I've heard that before.

Japanese: だって、データが 足りないんだもん！
English: Well, we never have enough information!

Japanese: すなおに “何も思いつきません”て言えよ。
English: Just admit it, you don't have a clue what happened.

Japanese: ‥‥かろうじて、まだ 光ってるね、それ。
English: Well... Your badge is still shining. Barely.

Japanese: もう１、２年もすると、 すっかりくすんじゃうな。
English: It may be showing a bit of wear, but I try to take good care of this thing.

Japanese: それにしてもなるほどくん、 ホントそれ見せるの好きだね。
English: You sure do love to show that off, don't you Nick?

Japanese: あたしなんて、何度 見せつけられたことか。
English: Who knows how many times you have shown it to me?

Japanese: （たしかに。‥‥つい 見せちゃうんだよな‥‥）
English: (She's right... I whip it out at the drop of a hat.)

Japanese: いかにも飛べそうだよねー、 そのシルクハット。
English: This silk hat really does look like it can fly!!

Japanese: ハネがついてるしなあ。
English: It does have a feather on it. Maybe that's why you think it can take off.

Japanese: そうだ！
English: You're right!

Japanese: なるほどくんも かぶろうよ、ぼうし。
English: Nick, I bet you could wear a hat like this!

Japanese: ホラ。メータンテーが よくかぶってるヤツ。
English: This is like one of those hats a famous detective would wear!

Japanese: そうだなあ‥‥。
English: Yeah... I guess so...

Japanese: あ。でも、そんなアタマじゃ ぼうしにアナがあいちゃうね。
English: But... With a head as big as yours, you'd probably bust a hole in the it!

Japanese: ううーん。
English: Hmm...

Japanese: どうしたの？
English: What's the matter, Maya?

Japanese: トノサマンのポスターとこれ、 どっちがいいかなあ？
English: Which poster is cooler? This one or the Steel Samurai poster?

Japanese: ぼくはどっちもイヤだけどな。
English: I'm not a big fan of either one of them.

Japanese: やっぱり、弁護士事務所に 魔術師はオカシイかな。
English: I guess putting a poster of a magician in a law office is kinda strange.

Japanese: （トノサマンのほうが もっとオカシイよ！）
English: (No stranger than a poster of a hunk of junk carrying around a spear!)

Japanese: いやあ、ハクリョク あったねー、リロくん。
English: Trilo is quite the intense actor, isn't he?

Japanese: いきなり“このヤロー” と来たときはビビったよ。
English: The way he blurts out "Buttface" all of a sudden; it sends a shiver up my spine.

Japanese: なるほどくんも 見ならわなきゃ。ああいうとこ。
English: I bet you could learn a thing or two about intensity from him, Nick.

Japanese: そ、そうかな‥‥。
English: Hmm... I guess...

Japanese: ‥‥これを見ると、 シンケンに考えちゃうよねー。
English: Looking at this really makes you think.

Japanese: 何が？
English: Like what?

Japanese: 霊媒師なんかやってたって、 こんなにギャラ、もらえないもん。
English: No matter how great a medium I become, there is no way I could make this kind of money.

Japanese: ギャラ、ほしいの？
English: So it's money you're after?

Japanese: 一度きりの人生だからね。 ゴージャスに行きたいよ！
English: You only live life once, right? Well, then you might as well live it fabulously!

Japanese: ‥‥これ。 つまらないものだけど。
English: This is kinda pointless don't you think?

Japanese: つまらないものなら 見せなくていいよ。
English: If it's that pointless, then you don't have to worry about showing it to me.

Japanese: （‥‥ごもっともだな）
English: (When she's right... She's right.)

Japanese: どうしたんだよ、さっきから？
English: What's the matter? You've been acting strange for a while now.

Japanese: マックスが‥‥ ニッポン人だったなんて‥‥
English: Max... He's just some country bumpkin...

Japanese: いいだろ？　べつに、 ナニ人でも。
English: So? Why does that matter? He's still a famous magician right?

Japanese: いいケドさ。 ‥‥いいケド。本名が山田でも。
English: I guess. But his real name is... Billy Bob Johns.

Japanese: （ちっとも、よくなさそうだな）
English: (Yikes! The poor guy's got three first names! I guess that is pretty odd.)

Japanese: よし！　こうなったら、 なるほどくんも外人ぽく行こうよ！
English: Oh well! If a big star can do it, then you should pretend to be exotic too, Nick!

Japanese: “こうなったら”‥‥？
English: "A big star..."?

Japanese: そうだねえ。
English: Max Galactica is a pretty big name!

Japanese: ロバート・Ｂ・ナルホドー ‥‥なんて、どう？
English: Anyways, what do you think about Naruhodo A. Wrighto?

Japanese: なんだよ、“Ｂ”って。
English: N-N-Na... *cough* Umm... What's the "A" stand for?

Japanese: “べんごし”の“Ｂ”。
English: The "A" stands for "Attorney".

Japanese: ‥‥考えておくよ。
English: I'll think about it...

Japanese: 霊媒師なんてやってるとさ。
English: Once you start channeling spirits...

Japanese: 本当の自分はいったいダレなんだ！ ‥‥なんて。
English: They say you lose sight of who you actually are...

Japanese: へえ‥‥。 そんなコト、思うの？
English: Hmm... Do you really believe that?

Japanese: ベツに思わないけど。
English: Not really. But...

Japanese: ちょっとイミありげでしょ。 そのうち、自伝に書こうと思って。
English: Just in case, I plan to write my autobiography.

Japanese: じでん‥‥？
English: Your autobiography...?

Japanese: それにしても、いっつも この刑事だよなあ、現場で会うの。
English: No matter what the crime, we always meet the same detective at the scene.

Japanese: もしかしたらさあ。ひとりしか いないのかもね。刑事さん。
English: Sometimes it seems like he's the only detective on the force.

Japanese: だとしたら、すごい エリートだよ、イトノコさん。
English: That would make Gumshoe really elite, wouldn't it?

Japanese: （どう見ても、エリートって ガラじゃないけどね‥‥）
English: (Something tells me that no matter how you look at it, he's anything but elite...)

Japanese: あれで、ズルいコトしなきゃ 好きになれるんだけどな。
English: You know, if she wasn't so mean, I think she and I would get along...

Japanese: “ズルいコト”じゃすまない モンダイだよ、あれは。
English: Yeah, but that's the problem... She is so mean.

Japanese: それに、あのムチ。 けっこうイタいぞあれは。
English: And that whip... That thing hurts. It really hurts.

Japanese: カッコいいよねー、ムチ。 あたしもほしいな。
English: It is kinda cool though. I wouldn't mind having a whip myself.

Japanese: なるほどくんを 思うさまたたいてみたい。
English: I bet that cracking the whip on you once or twice would be just what the doctor ordered!

Japanese: な、なんでぼくなんだよ‥‥。
English: W-Why me!? W-What did I do!?

Japanese: ‥‥団長さん、だれからも 好かれてるよね。
English: Everyone loved the Ringmaster...

Japanese: たしかに。
English: So I'm told.

Japanese: どうして殺されなきゃ ならなかったんだろう‥‥。
English: Why would anyone want to kill such a beloved man of the big top?

Japanese: また、ドーキでモメるのかな、 明日の法廷。
English: Motive will surely be a point of contention tomorrow in court.

Japanese: （ありそうなハナシだな‥‥）
English: (You can count on that...)

Japanese: いいよね、なんか腹話術って。
English: Being a ventriloquist sounds like an interesting job.

Japanese: できたら楽しいとは 思うけどね。
English: I bet it's fun once you get good at it.

Japanese: ね。ね。あたし、 ちょっとやってみようか。
English: Maybe I should give it a try then!

Japanese: いくよ！
English: Here I go!

Japanese: “こんにちは。 ぼく、なるほどくん”
English: "Hello e-e-everyone... I-I-I'm Phoenix Wright."

Japanese: “どんなウソでも 見やぶってやるぅ！”
English: "No matter what the lie or who the liar, I'll expose them for what they are!"

Japanese: どう？
English: What's the verdict?

Japanese: 動きまくってるよ、クチ。
English: You might want to practice not moving your lips so much.

Japanese: ううん。‥‥ちょっと、 修行してみようかなあ。
English: Y-Yeah... Maybe I should sign up for some expert training.

Japanese: （霊媒のほうは どうするんだ‥‥？）
English: (Don't you have another type of training to attend to, young lady...?)

Japanese: いいヒトだよね、トミーさん。
English: Moe is a really nice guy, don't you think Nick?

Japanese: サーカスのこと、 いっしょうけんめい考えてるし。
English: He taught us all about the inner workings of the circus.

Japanese: そうだな。ぼくも、ちょっと 見なおしたよ。
English: Yep. It definitely made me look at things in a new light.

Japanese: それに、あのギャグセンス。 ふるえるよねー、なるほどくん！
English: And he's got such a great sense of humor. It tickles your funny bone, doesn't it?

Japanese: （‥‥そこで意見が わかれるんだよな）
English: (Well... I can't argue that some people might find it funny...)

Japanese: （たしかに、ふるえることは ふるえるんだけど‥‥）
English: (But the only thing it tickles on me is my desire for high quality earplugs...)

Japanese: かわいいよねー、ミリカちゃん。
English: Regina is sooo cute!

Japanese: たしかに、なんだか異様な チカラがあるな、あの笑顔。
English: I have to admit that her smile does have a sort of hypnotic power.

Japanese: しかも、猛獣使い。 ‥‥カッコイイなあ。
English: Can you believe that she's an animal tamer? That's sooo cool!

Japanese: あたしもちょっと やってみたい。
English: I'd like to try animal taming someday.

Japanese: ホレ、なるほどくん！ おて！　おまわり！
English: Nick! Nick! Lie down! Roll over!!

Japanese: この事件が解決したら、 いくらでもまわってあげるよ。
English: Once this case is solved, I'll roll over for you as many times as you want!

Japanese: わあい！　ヤクソクだよ！
English: YAY!!! Remember, you promised, Nick!

Japanese: いやー、やっぱりみんな、 個性的だよね。芸人さんって。
English: All the stars here are so full of personality...

Japanese: ヘンなヒトばっかり。
English: And so incredibly strange...

Japanese: そうだね。
English: You can say that again.

Japanese: なるほどくんも、なれば？ 芸人さん。
English: Whaddya think, Nick? I wonder what you'd be like if you were a star?

Japanese: （どういうイミだ‥‥？）
English: (What does she mean by that?)

Japanese: 同日　午前１１時１９分 留置所・面会室
English: December 28, 11:19 AM Detention Center Visitor's Room

Japanese: どーいうコトよ！ なんでマックスが！
English: What are they talking about? Why did they arrest Max?

Japanese: ぼくに言うなよ。
English: You're asking the wrong man on that one, Maya.

Japanese: たぶん、魔術師だけに、 手品でも使って殺人を‥‥
English: Maybe he used his magical skills to deal death with a slight of hand...

Japanese: マックスは！　マックスは そんなコト、しないもん！
English: Maximillion Galactica would never do such a thing!!

Japanese: ゴージャス！ まさに、そのとおり！
English: FABULOUS!! What the young lady just said was absolutely fabulous!

Japanese: ‥‥さすがハニイ。 わかってるじゃないか。
English: What a clever girl! Such a fabulous understanding of events!

Japanese: （なな、なんだ “ゴージャス”って‥‥）
English: (...What's with all this fabulous talk...)

Japanese: ようこそ、わが面会室へ。
English: Welcome to the Visitor's Room!

Japanese: マックスだ！　なるほどくん！ ホンモノだよっ！
English: It's MAX!! Nick!! Look! It's the real Maximillion Galactica!!

Japanese: さあハニイ。 １枚、引いてくれないかい。
English: Alright sweetie. Pick a card, any card.

Japanese: は、“はにい”だって！ なるほどくん！
English: H-H-He called me sweetie! *swoon* Nick!!

Japanese: ハッハッハッ。 さあ、早くお引きよハニイ。
English: Ah ha ha ha... Time's running out sweetie! Pick a card, any card!

Japanese: ここ、こうですか？
English: T-This one...

Japanese: フッ‥‥。きっとハニイなら、 それを引くと思ったよ‥‥。
English: Uh-huh. I thought you would pick that one sweetie.

Japanese: ハートのエースをね！
English: The ace of hearts!

Japanese: きゃっ！　当たったよ、 なるほどくん！
English: AHHHH!!! He got it! He got it! NICK! LOOK! HE GOT IT!!

Japanese: ‥‥これでハニイは、 まんまと盗んだワケだねえ。
English: What can I say sweetie... You've stolen one of my most valued possessions.

Japanese: この、マックス・ギャラクティカの ハートを‥‥１ケ。
English: One of Maximillion Galactica's hearts...

Japanese: マックスゥ‥‥。
English: Max... *swoon*

Japanese: さあ。ゴージャスに行こうよ、 ハニイ！
English: Well... Time to make this an absolutely fabulous time!

Japanese: ね。ね。なるほどくんも やってもらいなよ！
English: Max! You should let Nick pick a card!!

Japanese: （マックスのハートなんて 盗みたくないぞ‥‥）
English: (Eek... I don't want to steal one of his hearts...)

Japanese: ‥‥ナニ、キミは。 ハニイの運転手？
English: And you are...? Oh, how silly of me! You must be sweetie's driver!
Her driver?

Japanese: まあいい。 さっさと引きたまえ、ホレ。
English: Whatever... Hurry up and pick a card, any card...

Japanese: は、はあ‥‥。
English: Umm... I want this one.

Japanese: さ。それで？　ハニイ。
English: So sweetie, let's be honest here...

Japanese: 今日は、このマックスに 面会してくれるために？
English: You came to this visitor's room to visit me, didn't you?

Japanese: は、はい！ あたし、大ファンなんです！
English: Y-Yes! I'm your biggest fan!!

Japanese: おお！　ゴージャスゴージャス！ とってもサンキュー！
English: Fabulous! Absolutely fabulous! Thank you so much!!

Japanese: あ、あの‥‥。 このカードは‥‥？
English: Hey... Umm... What about my card?

Japanese: やるよ。記念品だ。 取っときたまえ。
English: Think of it as a souvenir.

Japanese: さあ、なるほどくん。 そろそろ仕事にかかろうか。
English: Well Nick... I think it's time to get to work.

Japanese: どうしたの？　なるほどくん。 ソッポ向いて。
English: What's the matter, Nick? Why are you looking at the ceiling?

Japanese: おヒル、ナニ食べようか 考えてるんだ。
English: I was just thinking about what I should have for lunch.

Japanese: さあ、ハニイ。そんな ハリネズミはほっといて。
English: Sweetie... Drop porcupine head over there.

Japanese: キミのヒトミに、ボクだけを うつして。オーケイ、ハニイ？
English: Shower me with your attention. OK?

Japanese: い‥‥いえす‥‥
English: Y-Y-Y-Yes...

Japanese: んゴオオォォージャスゴージャス！
English: Ab-so-lute-ly... FABULOUS!!

Japanese: （やれやれ‥‥）
English: (Absolutely cringe inducing.)

Japanese: ところでさ。さっきから、 気になってるコトがあるんだ。
English: Anyways... I've been curious about something for a while now.

Japanese: なんですか？
English: What's that?

Japanese: どうしてハニイは、そんなに 悲しそうな目でボクを見るんだい？
English: Why do you keep looking at me with such a sad look on your face, sweetie?

Japanese: だ、だって！　タイホ されてるんですよ！　殺人罪で！
English: Be-Because! You've been arrested! For murder!

Japanese: なな、ナニをバカな。 そんなワケ、ないじゃないか！
English: Oh, don't be ignorant. They wouldn't arrest someone like me!!

Japanese: どうしてですか？
English: Why is that?

Japanese: だってボクは、マキシミリアン・ ギャラクティカだよ？
English: Obviously because I'm the fabulous Maximillion Galactica!

Japanese: それで？
English: So?

Japanese: タチミ・サーカスの大スターだ。
English: I'm the very big star of the Berry Big Circus.

Japanese: 他には？
English: And that means?

Japanese: ギャラもたくさん、もらってる。
English: I'm rich. I'm paid fabulous sums!

Japanese: だから？
English: Which means what?

Japanese: マックスさん‥‥。
English: Max...

Japanese: まま、まさか！　ウソだろ！
English: Quit joking around! You've got to be pulling my magic wand!

Japanese: ケーサツの連中、 ホンキでボクにタイホ状を？
English: The police aren't really serious about all this, are they?

Japanese: 冗談で逮捕状はもらえません。
English: They don't arrest people as a joke.

Japanese: ま、マックスさん、 ヘコんじゃったよ‥‥。
English: Look at Max... He's crushed...

Japanese: いいクスリじゃないか。 （ぼくもスッキリしたし）
English: Well, he needed to wake up and smell the coffee. (This is serious business.)
Umm... Umm...

Japanese: はい？
English: Yes?

Japanese: キミ‥‥いや、 アナタ、弁護士さん？
English: Porcu... I mean, Sir. You're a lawyer, right?

Japanese: え？　ええ、そうです。
English: Huh? Oh, yeah. I'm an attorney.

Japanese: おねがいだあ！　助けてけれ！ オラ、殺してねえよ？
English: Please! Help me! I didn't kill nobody!
"Didn't kill nobody!?"

Japanese: オラ、ちょっとチヤホヤされて、 テングになってたかもしんね。
English: I may be more spoiled than a hog in a hamburger mud pit...

Japanese: で、でもよ？　殺人なんて‥‥
English: But a killer!?

Japanese: オラ、そんな、 オソロシげなコトよぉぉ‥‥！
English: That's insane... I... I... I could never...

Japanese: まま、マックス‥‥？
English: M-Max?

Japanese: ホントだよぉ！
English: I swear!!

Japanese: イナカの父ちゃんの借金、 返したかっただけなんだぁ！
English: I just wanted to pay off my daddy's debt... He's back on the farm...

Japanese: ‥‥わ、わかりましたよ。 引き受けますから！
English: OK... OK... I'll take your case.

Japanese: ホントけ？　ホントけ？
English: R-Really?

Japanese: ホントです、ホントです。
English: Really.

Japanese: うう‥‥。あ、ありがとな。 あんたら、あったけえよぉぉ。
English: Uh... Thank ya much. Ya'll sure are nice folks.

Japanese: あ、あの‥‥マックスさん。
English: Umm... Max.

Japanese: あんだ？
English: Yes?

Japanese: ホントのお名前は ‥‥なんて？
English: What's your real name?

Japanese: 山田　耕平（やまだこうへい） だけんど？
English: It's Billy Bob Johns...
Ugh...

Japanese: ど、どうしたの？ 真宵ちゃん。
English: What's the matter, Maya?

Japanese: ニッポン人だったんだ。
English: He's really just a country bumpkin!

Japanese: ‥‥フッ。
English: ...Ahem.

Japanese: さっきは、ちょっと取りみだして、 すまなかったねハニイ。
English: I must apologize for not being my absolutely fabulous self just now, sweetie.

Japanese: は、はあ‥‥。
English: H-Huh?

Japanese: 弁護士さん。
English: Mr. Attorney.

Japanese: はい。
English: Yes?

Japanese: さっき、ぼくのカードを １枚、引いたね？
English: A few minutes ago, you took one of my cards, didn't you?

Japanese: （あ、ああ‥‥そういえば‥‥）
English: (Hmm... Now that he mentions it... I did take a card.)

Japanese: ハートの１０‥‥をね。
English: It was the 10 of Hearts. Right?

Japanese: （げ。あ、当たってるよ！）
English: (Wha... How'd he... He got it right, again!)

Japanese: これでアナタも、 まんまと盗んだわけだ‥‥
English: What can I say? You too... You've stolen some of my most valued possessions.

Japanese: この、マックス・ギャラクティカの ハートを‥‥１０ケ。
English: Ten of Maximillion Galactica's hearts...

Japanese: （あんたは、いくつ ハートがあるんだよ！）
English: (You sure do have a lot of hearts, don't you?)

Japanese: フッフッフッ‥‥。 よろしくたのむよ、ハニイ。
English: Ah ha ha ha... I'm putting my faith in you sweetie.

Japanese: （ハニイ‥‥って、 ぼくのことか？）
English: (He didn't just call me sweetie, did he?)

Japanese: よーし！　ゴージャスに 行こうね！　なるほどくん！
English: Alright! Let's make this an absolutely fabulous case! C'mon Nick!

Japanese: 面会のようすを監視する看守だ。
English: This guard monitors the visitor's room.

Japanese: 何か言いたげに こちらをジッと見ている。
English: He's so quiet, you could forget he was even there... If he wasn't watching everything.

Japanese: ‥‥うしろにかくしてるのは‥‥ 色紙とサインペンのようだ。
English: He's pushed up against the wall... Kinda like a magnet on a refrigerator.

Japanese: ごていねいに、カメラで 見張っているようだ。
English: Smile, you're on candid camera.

Japanese: マックスがたまに チラリと視線を送っている。
English: Max keeps sneaking glances up at the security camera on the wall...

Japanese: 芸能人の悲しいサガ みたいなものなのかな。
English: I wonder if he is still trying to be a star?

Japanese: あの。マックスさんのコト、 教えてほしいんですけど‥‥。
English: Max, I was hoping you could tell me a little bit more about yourself...

Japanese: ゴージャス！　キミもその気に なってくれたかいハニイ。
English: FABULOUS! I think we should get to know each other better, too!

Japanese: いいとも。 さあ、こっちへおいでよハニイ！
English: Why don't you come sit next to me?

Japanese: ‥‥でも、防弾ガラスの カベがありますけど‥‥。
English: Umm... There's a big piece of security glass between us...

Japanese: ‥‥おお、ジーザス！ なんてことだ！
English: Oh sweet geebus! What in the world!?

Japanese: ああ、ボクに魔法が使えたら！ こんなカベなんて‥‥。
English: If only I could use magic! Then I could make this wall disappear...

Japanese: （手品師がナニ言ってるんだよ！）
English: (What is this guy talking about!?)

Japanese: ところで‥‥最近、急に有名に なりましたよね、マックスさん。
English: Anyways... Lately, you've become awfully famous, haven't you Max?

Japanese: マックス“様”だよキミ。 やりなおしたまえ。
English: That's Maximillion to you, porcupine head! Get it straight!

Japanese: （こんなのばっかりだぞ最近‥‥）
English: (Jeez, people nowadays... They get their panties all in a bunch over nothing!)

Japanese: ‥‥たしか、大きな賞を 取られたとか。マックス様。
English: Anyway, Maximillion, you won a very prestigious award recently, did you not?

Japanese: ゴージャス！　そのとおり。
English: I did indeed! It was FABULOUS!

Japanese: 国際マジック協会のコンテスト。 ボクはグランプリを受賞したのさ！
English: I won the Magician's Grand Prix, held by the Association of International Magicians.

Japanese: 世界でサイコーにゴージャスな マジシャンにおくられる賞だ。
English: It's an award that recognizes that I am the most fabulouso of fabulous world magicians.

Japanese: トロフィーに、胸像。 ‥‥スバラシイ１日だったよ。
English: There was a trophy, and a bust. It was a fab... I mean it was an amazing day.

Japanese: へええ。スゴいんですねえ。
English: Wow! That's incredible!

Japanese: そう。スゴいんだ。 なにしろ、世界一だからね。
English: Isn't it!? I'm certifiably the greatest magician in the world!

Japanese: （たしかに‥‥ここまで成功した 魔術師なんて、聞いたことない）
English: (I'm going to guess he didn't win a trophy for most modest magician.)

Japanese: 独占出演契約を結んだんですよね。 タチミ・サーカスと。
English: You are signed to an exclusive contract with the Berry Big Circus, correct?

Japanese: そのとおり！　さすが ボクのハニイ。よく知ってるね。
English: That's the long and short of it. You sure do your research sweetie! I'm impressed.

Japanese: 大魔術はね、テレビで 見るものじゃないんだ。
English: You just can't watch a magician on TV, you know!?

Japanese: 目の前で、こうゴージャスに 楽しむものなんだよハニイ。
English: Magic is so fabulous, you have to see it with your own eyes, sweetie!

Japanese: わかりますわかります！
English: You're right! You're so right!

Japanese: そもそも、サーカスなんてさ。 古クサい、過去の化石だよ。
English: However, the circus... It's a dinosaur. A thing of the past.

Japanese: ‥‥今さらそんなもの、 ダレも見やしない。
English: Nowadays, no one even cares about what goes on there.

Japanese: え。 ‥‥そ、そんなことは‥‥
English: Huh? What do you mean?

Japanese: ボクはね！　だからこそ 契約してやったんだよ！
English: That's why I signed the contract!!

Japanese: どういうことですか？
English: That's why you signed the contract?

Japanese: タチミ・サーカスは 今や、大人気さ！
English: Thanks to me, the Berry Big Circus is fabulously popular!

Japanese: マックス・ギャラクティカの芸が ヒトを呼ぶんだ！
English: People come out in droves to catch a glimpse of the magic of Max Galactica!

Japanese: つぶれかけていたサーカスが 奇跡の復活！
English: I revived the dinosaur that is the circus!

Japanese: これもまた、ボクの大魔術なのさ。 ゴージャスだろ？　ハニイ！
English: But to me, it was just another magic trick! Isn't it just wonderful, sweetie?

Japanese: そ‥‥そうですね。
English: Y-Yes...

Japanese: ヤツらのカビクサい芸なんて、 もう時代が求めていないんだ！
English: I made all the old crusty circus performances obsolete!

Japanese: ‥‥あたし、 サーカス好きですけど‥‥。
English: But I kinda like the circus performances...

Japanese: （真宵ちゃん、 ちょっとさびしそうだな‥‥）
English: (Maya looks a bit down...)

Japanese: いったい、タチミ・サーカスで 何があったんですか？
English: Tell me what happened at the Berry Big Circus.

Japanese: ああ。なんか、ゆうべさ。 殺されたんだよ、団長が。
English: Ahh... Last night. The Ringmaster was murdered.

Japanese: 団長‥‥って、 タチミ・サーカスの‥‥
English: The Ringmaster... You mean Russell Berry?

Japanese: 殴られたらしいよ。 地面にメリこむほどね。
English: Someone smashed him over the head, I hear. He was slumped over on the ground.

Japanese: 真夜中だってのに、警察が ゴージャスに現れてさあ。
English: Even though it was the middle of the night, the police presence was fabulous.

Japanese: ボクも、やっと取り調べが 終わったところなんだ。
English: The police questioned me at length...

Japanese: ‥‥取り調べ？
English: Questioned you about what?

Japanese: なんでもね。殺された団長に 最後に会ったのが、ボクらしくて。
English: About everything... I was the last one to see the Ringmaster before he was murdered.

Japanese: ‥‥ゆうべ、団長の部屋でね。
English: I saw him that night... In his room.

Japanese: どうして、タイホ されちゃったんですか？
English: So then why were you arrested?

Japanese: ‥‥タイホ？ 大ゲサだなあハニイは。
English: Arrested? Don't make an ant hill into a mountain, sweetie.

Japanese: 参考までに、話をしてやった だけだよ、ボクは。
English: They just wanted to consult with me on matters... That's all.

Japanese: なるほどくん‥‥。
English: Nick...

Japanese: マックスさん、自分の立場を わかってないみたい。
English: I don't think Max understands how serious this is.

Japanese: （そうだな‥‥キチンと 思い知らせてあげようか‥‥）
English: (She's right... I think I should shock him back to reality...)

Japanese: 事件の前に、 団長に会ったんですね？
English: Before the murder, you met with the Ringmaster?

Japanese: そうだよ。
English: Uh-huh.

Japanese: どんな話を？
English: What did you talk about?

Japanese: キミには言いたくない。
English: Things that aren't for your ears.

Japanese: 真宵ちゃん。よろしく。
English: Maya. Would you please ask him?

Japanese: どんな話をしたんですか？ 団長さんと。
English: What did you talk about with the Ringmaster, Max?

Japanese: いやね。下世話な話で アレなんだけどさ。
English: It was nothing... Small talk really...

Japanese: ‥‥ギャラのコトで ちょっと、ね。
English: We were just having a chat about my salary.

Japanese: ぎゃら‥‥？
English: Salary?

Japanese: サーカスは、ボク１人の力で ヒトを集めている。
English: I am the one bringing in all of the crowds to the circus.

Japanese: もっと、もらってもイイと 思ったんだ。わかるだろハニイ？
English: I think that I should be compensated as such. You agree, don't you?

Japanese: は‥‥はい。
English: Y-Yes...

Japanese: 話したのは、それだけですか？
English: That's all you talked about?

Japanese: ゴージャス！　もちろんだよ！
English: Of course! It was a fabulous chat!

Japanese: （ゴージャス！　この手品師、 何かかくしてる、ってワケか！）
English: (Fabulous! Why does he have to keep saying fabulous!?)

Japanese: どうしたの？　なるほどくん。 ‥‥タメ息なんかついて。
English: What's the matter, Nick? You look all bent out of shape.

Japanese: ゴージャスな魔術を 生み出すにはね。
English: When you make absolutely fabulous magic...

Japanese: カネがかかるんだよ。 ビックリするぐらいね。
English: It costs enormous sums of money. Sums that will boggle your mind!

Japanese: それで出演料を上げてほしい、って おねがいしたんですね。
English: That's why you went to his room that night...?

Japanese: ゴージャス！　それでゆうべ、 彼の部屋に行った、ってワケ。
English: I went to ask him for a fabulous raise.

Japanese: （‥‥人間てみんな、こんな平気な カオしてウソをつくのかな？）
English: (I wonder how people can lie with such a straight face...)

Japanese: ‥‥なんだ、そのバッジ？ 消してみせるっての？
English: What is that badge? Is it used in a disappearing act?

Japanese: ぼくは魔術師じゃありません。 ‥‥弁護士なんです。
English: I'm not a magician, Max. I'm an attorney.

Japanese: べんごし？ ぼくにはカンケーないね‥‥
English: An attorney? Then why are you wasting your time talking to me?

Japanese: そんなことないです！ だって、マックスさんは‥‥
English: He isn't wasting his time! Max... You're...

Japanese: オーケイオーケイ。 ‥‥うれしいよハニイ。
English: OK! OK! Relax, sweetie...

Japanese: ボクのために、そんな 取りこし苦労を。
English: You're just a little overanxious I think...

Japanese: ううう‥‥
English: *whimper*

Japanese: おお！　ボクの シルクハットじゃないか！
English: Ahh! This is my silk hat!

Japanese: 世界で１個しかない、 ボクだけのタカラモノだよ。
English: It's the only one of its kind in the world. It's one of my most prized possessions.

Japanese: そのシルクハットこそ、 ぼくがそこにいた、アカシなのさ。
English: This silk hat proves that I was somewhere else...

Japanese: ‥‥で？　それ、どこで 見つけたのかな？　ハニイ。
English: Where did they find this? Huh, sweetie?

Japanese: 殺人現場で。
English: They found it at the murder scene.

Japanese: ぎゃああああっ！
English: AHHHHHHHHHHHH!!!

Japanese: オラ‥‥オラ‥‥ 知らねえよ？　そんな‥‥ I... I...
English: I don't know nothing about nothing!

Japanese: やだよー！　こんな なさけないマックスなんて‥‥
English: Eww... Max is so pathetic like this...

Japanese: （大コンランに なってしまった‥‥）
English: (Max must be really confused...)

Japanese: う。‥‥こ、これは ‥‥団長。
English: That's... That's the Ringmaster.

Japanese: おキノドクだ。
English: It's a shame what happened...

Japanese: ボクのパパになるはずの ヒトだったのに‥‥。
English: He was going to be like a father to me...

Japanese: （なんか言ったか‥‥？）
あの、これなんですけど‥‥。
English: What about this?

Japanese: ゴージャス！　このボクが、 そんなものにサインすると思うか？
English: Fabulous!! You'd like me to sign this for you?

Japanese: （してもらおうとも思わないよ！）
English: (*sigh*)

Japanese: どうだい？　今度、 ボクのステージに来ないかい？
English: So, would you like to come up on stage with me sometime?

Japanese: え！　いいんですか！
English: Re-Really? Is that really OK?

Japanese: お客さん代表として、 ステージに上げてあげるよ。
English: I'll bring you up on stage as a volunteer from the audience!

Japanese: ホントにッ！
English: REALLY!?

Japanese: で、前もってわたしておいた ネタを、こっそりボクに‥‥
English: I'll give you something before the show, and then on stage you'll sneak it to me...

Japanese: （‥‥それ、 サクラじゃないか！）
English: (Wait a second... He's planting her in the audience to rig a magic trick!)

Japanese: あの、これなんですけど‥‥。
English: Do you mind taking a look at this?

Japanese: はぁ。しかたないな。 ‥‥‥‥‥‥ホレ。
English: I guess I have no choice... But really, is this the proper time or place for this?

Japanese: （写真にサイン書かれた‥‥）
English: (He signed his own photo...)

Japanese: 事件が解決したら ちょうだいね、それ。
English: Nick... You mind giving that to me when the case is over?

Japanese: おお、ボクのスウィート・ハニイ。
English: Ahhh... My sweetie pie.

Japanese: ボクがこんなことになって、 さぞさびしがっていただろうね。
English: She must be really lonely with me all cooped up in here.

Japanese: （ニコニコしてトラと たわむれてたけど‥‥）
English: (Actually, she was laughing and rolling around with her tiger...)

Japanese: 彼女は、ボクのトクベツなんだ。 そしてボクは、彼女のトクベツ。
English: She is my special someone. And I am her special someone.

Japanese: うーん。‥‥フクザツですねえ。
English: Uh-huh... Very complex...

Japanese: この人物なんですけど‥‥。
English: What about this person?

Japanese: ワルいけど。‥‥ボク、 弟子はとらない主義でね。
English: Unfortunately I don't take on apprentices.

Japanese: だいいち、見こみなさそうだよ そのツラは。
English: I mean, just look at the face on this one... It's not what I'd call fabulous.

Japanese: （ヒドい言われようだな‥‥）
English: (That's awfully harsh...)

Japanese: 同日　某時刻 留置所・面会室
English: December 28 Detention Center Visitor's Room

Japanese: いないね、マックス。
English: Max isn't here.

Japanese: 取り調べかな。
English: He must be in questioning.

Japanese: ちぇっ。 また手品、見たかったのに。
English: Aww... I wanted to see a magic trick.

Japanese: もう少ししてから また、来ようか。
English: He should be back in a little bit.

Japanese: そうだね。
English: I guess so.

Japanese: 面会のようすを監視する看守だ。
English: This guard monitors the visitor's room.

Japanese: タイクツなのだろうか。 こっちには見向きもしない。
English: I wonder if he is bored? He doesn't even try to glance over this way...

Japanese: ごていねいに、カメラで 見張っているようだ。
English: Smile, you're on candid camera.

Japanese: 同日　某時刻 留置所・面会室
English: December 28 Detention Center Visitor's Room

Japanese: おお、ボクのハニイたち！ ようこそ留置所へ！
English: Oh! It's my two sweeties! Welcome to the Detention Center!!

Japanese: （‥‥やれやれ。 ついにハニイにされちまった）
English: (...*sigh* Did he just call me his sweetie!? AGAIN!?)

Japanese: それで？ どうなんだいハニイ、ボクは？
English: What's on today's agenda? What can I help you with?

Japanese: 手がかりは、 かなり集まりました。
English: Well, we've gathered quite a few clues...

Japanese: んゴオオォォージャスゴージャス！ ‥‥そして、ゴージャス。
English: WON-DER-FUL-LY FAN-TAB-U-LOSO!! I mean fabulous!

Japanese: それで‥‥。もう一度、あなたに 会う必要が出てきたんです。
English: That's why we came to meet with you again.

Japanese: な、な、なんだ、なんだなんだ。 コワいカオはやめようよ。
English: Wh-Wh-What's w-w-wrong!? Quit making such a scary face!

Japanese: じゃあ、ゴージャスに行きますよ マックスさん！
English: OK then Max... Let's make this "absolutely fabulous"!!

Japanese: マックスさんのこと、サーカスで いろいろ聞いてきたんです。
English: We heard a lot about you at the circus, Max.

Japanese: ああ。あの時代おくれの 芸人たちかい。
English: Ahhh, you must mean from the dinosaurs? How were those Jurassic geriatrics?

Japanese: マックスさん、 評判ワルいですよ？
English: Max, you aren't very popular with the other performers, are you?

Japanese: ハッハッハッ。ハニイ。 それは、ジェラシイというんだ。
English: Yes yes yes. Sweetie, that's what they call jealousy. J-E-A-L-O-U-S-Y.

Japanese: ボクの才能に対する、 シットなのさ。
English: They are absolutely jealous of my absolutely fabulous self!

Japanese: でも、わかるヒトは、 ちゃんとわかってくれるんだよ。
English: People who really understand can see the obvious differences between us.

Japanese: わかるヒト‥‥？
English: People who really understand?

Japanese: たとえば、ボクの スウィート・ハニイさ。
English: For instance, my sweetie pie.

Japanese: （もしかして‥‥ ミリカちゃんのコトか？）
English: (Hmm, so Regina understands him huh?)

Japanese: 彼女とね。ケッコンする つもりなんだよ、ボクは。
English: I plan on getting married to her. She is truly my sweetie pie princess.

Japanese: うわあ！　そうなんですか！
English: Wow! That's so cool!

Japanese: ああ。決まってるんだ、もう。
English: It's already in the works.

Japanese: へえええええ。
English: Hmm...

Japanese: （ヘンだな‥‥。ミリカちゃん “いっぱい悩んでる”って‥‥）
English: (That's strange. Regina never said anything about marrying this joker...)

Japanese: 事件のあった夜、 団長に会ったんですよね？
English: You met with the Ringmaster on the night of the murder?

Japanese: そのとおり！　１０時ごろにね、 練習が終わったんだ。
English: Yes. I was with him around 10 PM. Once I was done with practice.

Japanese: それで、すぐ団長の部屋に 行ったワケさ。
English: I went to his room right after we finished.

Japanese: 団長さんの死体、宿舎の前の広場で 見つかったんですよね‥‥。
English: They found the Ringmaster's body in the plaza in front of the lodging house.

Japanese: ああ。それなんだけどね。
English: Yeah, I head about that...

Japanese: 彼、ボクとの話を中断して、 部屋を出て行っちまったんだよ。
English: He needed to step out for a bit, so I waited in his room for him to return.
...Huh?

Japanese: 『すまん、マックス。 ちょっと、急用があるんだ』
English: "Sorry Max. I have something I must attend to right now."

Japanese: 『ここで待っていてくれんか』
English: "Do you mind waiting for me right here?"

Japanese: 『ソトはサムいですよ？』
English: "It's pretty cold outside. Where's your coat?"

Japanese: 『すぐもどる。 １０分もかからんと思うよ』
English: "It's alright. I'll be right back. It should only take about 10 minutes."

Japanese: ‥‥それで？
English: And then?

Japanese: 待っていたさ、ボクは。
English: I waited for him.

Japanese: そして彼は‥‥帰ってこなかった。
English: But he never came back...

Japanese: ‥‥死体が発見された 広場に行ったんでしょうか。
English: Did he go to the plaza where the body was discovered?

Japanese: たぶんね。雪はやんでいたけど サムかったよ。
English: Possibly. The snow had tapered off a bit, but it was still very cold outside.

Japanese: 何しに行ったんだか‥‥。
English: But I have no idea what he went off to do...

Japanese: じつは‥‥昨日の朝メシのとき、 アイツとトラブルがあってさ。
English: The truth is... Yesterday morning during breakfast, we had a run in.

Japanese: 腹話術師のベンさんですか？
English: You mean you had a fight with Ben the ventriloquist?

Japanese: うーん‥‥まあ、そうだな。
English: You could put it that way.

Japanese: どうしてケンカなんか？ ベンさん、おとなしそうなのに。
English: Why did you fight with him? Ben seems like such a quiet man.

Japanese: スウィート・ハニイのコト だったからね。
English: We fought about my sweetie pie.

Japanese: ‥‥ミリカちゃん‥‥？
English: You mean Regina?

Japanese: あんなガラの悪いヤロウが、 ボクのハニイにアイを語るなんて！
English: That ill-bred creep told my sweetie pie princess that he was in love with her!

Japanese: ユルされてたまるかッ！
English: Would you put up with that?

Japanese: “ガラの悪い”‥‥！ ‥‥あの、ベンさんが？
English: "Ill-bred"!! Are you talking about the same Ben!?

Japanese: “アイを語る”‥‥！ ‥‥あの、ベンさんが？
English: "Told her he was in love with her"!! Are you sure this is Ben we are talking about!?

Japanese: ま。カッとなっちまってね。 ちょっとコツンとやったわけだ。
English: All I can say is that he made me mad and I had to tap him on his hard head!

Japanese: それで、団長に呼ばれたんだけど、 ねがってもないチャンスだったね！
English: That's when the Ringmaster called me and I realized that it was my chance!

Japanese: チャンス？
English: Your chance?

Japanese: 彼の部屋に行ってさあ。 言ってやったよ！
English: That's when I went to his room and I laid it all out on the table.

Japanese: “ハニイをください”って。
English: I asked him to "Let me marry my sweetie pie!"

Japanese: ええっ！
English: What!?

Japanese: 団長は言ったよ。 “ああ、いいとも”ってね。
English: The Ringmaster told me that it "sounds good to me!"

Japanese: だから！　スウィート・ハニイは ボクのモンなんだ！
English: That's why my sweetie pie is MY sweetie pie!

Japanese: ダレがわたすかッ！
English: And no one else's!

Japanese: は、はあ‥‥。
English: Hmm... I see...

Japanese: メンドウだから、アイツを ダマらせてやったよ！
English: Since Ben was causing me so much trouble, I realized I had to shut him up.

Japanese: （‥‥ダマらせた‥‥？）
English: (...Shut him up?)

Japanese: あの‥‥ “ダマらせた”‥‥というのは？
English: Um... What do you mean by "shut him up"?

Japanese: ハニイたちは知らないんだっけ。
English: You don't know, do you my sweeties?

Japanese: リロはね。ベンがいないと しゃべれないんだ。
English: Unless Ben and Trilo are together, Trilo can't say a word.

Japanese: ‥‥リロ？
English: Trilo...?

Japanese: 人形だよ。腹話術の。
English: The puppet. The ventriloquist's puppet. His real name is Trilo Quist.

Japanese: そりゃあ‥‥ 人形はしゃべらないでしょう。
English: But... A puppet doesn't talk.

Japanese: だからさ。ちょいと、 かくしてやったんだよ。
English: I know! That's why I hid it!

Japanese: ケーサツの連中に 連れてこられる前に、ね。
English: Before the police came and took me away of course...

Japanese: ‥‥つまらんコトを しゃべられたら困るからさ。
English: If that puppet started flapping off at the balsa, I'd be screwed.

Japanese: かくした‥‥ 腹話術の人形を、ですか？
English: You hid him? You mean the ventriloquist's puppet?

Japanese: ああ。いいキミだね。
English: You are so smart sweetie!

Japanese: あの‥‥。 どこにかくしたんですか？
English: Umm... Where did you hide him?

Japanese: おや？　ハニイ。
English: What? Sweetie...

Japanese: まさか、アイツの味方を するつもりなのかい？
English: You aren't thinking of trying to add him to my defense are you?

Japanese: だって‥‥ベンさん、 ちょっとサビしそうにしてたから。
English: Well... Ben does seem awfully lonely without his puppet.

Japanese: ゴージャス！　これでヤツも 思い知ったろう。
English: FABULOUS! That should have taught him a lesson!

Japanese: ‥‥オーケイ。リロは団長室に かくしておいた。
English: OK... I hid Trilo in the Ringmaster's room.

Japanese: あいつに返してやっといて くれないか、ハニイたち。
English: You don't mind going there and getting Trilo for me, do you my sweets?

Japanese: はい！ ありがとう、マックスさん！
English: No problem! None at all! Thank you Max!!

Japanese: フッ。困ってるヒトを見ると、 ほっとけないタチでね‥‥。
English: You know I can't stand to see my sweeties in a jam!

Japanese: （じゃあ、はじめっから かくすなよ、人形‥‥）
English: (Then don't go hiding puppets!)

Japanese: ああ、そいつだよ。 ‥‥リロ。ナマイキな人形さ。
English: This punk, huh? Trilo is such a wooden, cheeky excuse for a puppet!

Japanese: くそッ！　人形のクセに、 ボクの恋ガタキなんて！
English: I can't believe that this thing is what I'm up against for Regina's love!

Japanese: ああ、スウィート・ハニイ！ ボクだけを見つめておくれ！
English: Ahh... My sweetie pie... Love only me...

Japanese: ‥‥こいがたき‥‥？
English: ...What? You're up against what for Regina's love!?

Japanese: とにかく、早く返して あげよう。ベンさんに。
English: Whatever. Let's hurry up and give this thing back to Ben.

Japanese: いつ見てもホレボレするね。 マックス・ギャラクティカ。
English: Maximillion Galactica! No matter when you see me, you get shivers don't you?

Japanese: シルクハットにマント、そして ムネの白いバラ。
English: The silk hat... The cloak... The white roses on my chest...

Japanese: ‥‥ボクのシンボルさ。 やっと、３つにしぼったんだ。
English: They're my symbols... You know I had to cut the number of symbols to three?

Japanese: 最初はいくつ あったんですか？
English: Really? You had quite a few to begin with then, huh?

Japanese: いや、多いほうがいいと 思ってさ。
English: Well, I thought that you could never have too many symbols...

Japanese: サングラスにホクロ、ヒゲに 出っ歯にタラコくちびる‥‥
English: Sunglasses... Beauty mark... Soft pillows for lips... A beard... Buck teeth...

Japanese: 各種シンボルを取りそろえて みたんだけど。
English: I gave all sorts of symbols a shot.

Japanese: メイクのときに忘れると、 ダレだかわからなくなるんでね。
English: But if I forgot one when I put on my makeup, everyone would forget who I am!

Japanese: タイヘンですねー、魔術師も。
English: That's awful... Especially for a magician.

Japanese: ‥‥こんなにギャラを もらって、どうするんですか？
English: Can I ask what you do with such an exorbitant salary?

Japanese: 話さなかったかな？ オヤジが借金をしててね。
English: We've already covered this point. I'm paying off my father's debt.

Japanese: ど、どうやったら こんなに借金できるんですか！
English: How could he possibly have such a large amount of debt?

Japanese: たとえば‥‥ビデオをレンタル したとしよう。
English: For example, say you rented a video...

Japanese: そのまま１０年間、忘れて いたとしたら‥‥
English: And perhaps you forgot about it, for say... a short period of about 10 years.

Japanese: タイヘンな料金をとられる。 ‥‥それと同じことだよ。
English: You'd would have the biggest late fee known to man... It's kinda like that.

Japanese: へえええ。 なるほどねえ‥‥。
English: Wow... Now I can see how you can get that much debt.

Japanese: （わかったような わかんないような‥‥）
English: (That makes sense now. Wait a minute... That doesn't make any sense!)

Japanese: くそっ！　あんなツラで ボクのハニイに手を出すなんて！
English: I can't believe a guy with that ugly mug is after my sweetie pie princess!

Japanese: どうせ、ボクのミリョクには ゼンゼンかなわないクセに！
English: Especially after she has eluded my charms for such a long time!

Japanese: ‥‥それなら、気にするコト ないじゃないですか？
English: There isn't much you can do about that, right?

Japanese: フッ。キミはホンキでダレかを 好きになったことがないね？
English: Hmph. You haven't even been truly in love, have you?

Japanese: え。
English: Umm...

Japanese: 本当のコイをすると‥‥
English: When you are truly in love with someone...

Japanese: そのヒトを写すカガミにさえ シットするものなのだッ！
English: You'd be jealous of their mirror because it traps their image inside.

Japanese: ひゃあ‥‥。ソーゼツだねえ なるほどくん。
English: Awww... Don't you think that's sweet of him, Nick?

Japanese: ボクのスウィート・ハニイに もう１度チョッカイを出したら！
English: I'm gonna get back with my sweetie pie!

Japanese: バラバラにしてやる！ ‥‥リロのヤツ！
English: Then I'm gonna turn that dumb puppet into a toy glider!

Japanese: ‥‥どうやら、まだ なかなおりしてないみたいだね。
English: ...I guess you two haven't worked out your differences yet.

Japanese: ‥‥ま。ここだけのハナシ。
English: Just between you and I...

Japanese: ワルいヒトではなかった。 ‥‥これだけは言えるよ。
English: He's wasn't a bad guy at all. I can say that for sure...

Japanese: マックスさんがヒトを ほめるの、はじめて聞いたね。
English: That's the first time I've ever heard you say something nice about someone, Max.

Japanese: きっと、ホントにいい人 だったんじゃないかな。
English: He must have really been a nice guy...

Japanese: ‥‥う、うーん。
English: U-Uh-huh...

Japanese: ちょっと、こういうのはね。
English: This woman, huh?

Japanese: やっぱりボクにふさわしいのは、 ふんわりやさしいハニイさ。
English: Well... My type of woman is a gentle sweetie...

Japanese: はあ。ミリカちゃんに ゾッコンなんだねー。
English: Sounds like you are describing Regina!

Japanese: （‥‥というより、この視線に ビビってるだけじゃないか？）
English: (Well, he's definitely not describing Franziska!)

Japanese: ～団長に会ったこと～
English: -- Meeting with Russell --

Japanese: きのうの夜‥‥ 団長に会ったんですよね。
English: Last night, you met with the Ringmaster, correct?

Japanese: ギャラの交渉をした、とか。
English: To negotiate your salary, and such?

Japanese: そうさ！　半年前に契約したときの ギャラじゃ、ナットクが‥‥
English: Exactly... We reached an agreement about the salary from my 6 month old contract.

Japanese: 本当にそうだったんですか？
English: That's the truth? The whole truth?

Japanese: な‥‥なんだって！
English: What do you mean!?

Japanese: 本当にギャラの交渉をしに 行ったのか、聞いてるんです。
English: You just went to his office to negotiate your new salary?

Japanese: ぼ、ボクはウソが大キライなんだ！ ‥‥それともナニかい？
English: I hate lies and I hate liars even more! What are you insinuating!?

Japanese: ボクがゆうべ、ギャラの交渉を しなかった証拠でもあるのかい？
English: Do you have any proof that I did something other than negotiate my fee last night?

Japanese: ジーザス‥‥。
English: Geebus...

Japanese: どうですか？
English: What's the matter?

Japanese: ハニイ。キミは、ヒトの話を よく聞いてないねえ‥‥。
English: Sweetie, you must have some wax build up in your ears. You haven't listened to me at all!

Japanese: え。
English: Huh?

Japanese: 言っただろ？　ボクはウソが 大キライだ、って。
English: You're still not listening are you? I said that I HATE LIES!

Japanese: （‥‥どうやら、この証拠で 口を割らせるのはムリだな‥‥）
English: (It seems this evidence isn't enough to make him confess...)

Japanese: まだやるかい？ ボクはかまわないけどね！
English: You want to try again? It doesn't bother me at all!!

Japanese: ‥‥そ、それは‥‥！
English: Th-Tha-That's!!

Japanese: 団長室のテーブルにありました。
English: It was on the table in the Ringmaster's room.

Japanese: たしかに、ギャラが グンと上がってますね‥‥。
English: You weren't lying when you said that you received quite a raise...

Japanese: な、ナニかモンダイでも あるのかい？
English: Is there a problem with being well compensated?

Japanese: 書類の日付です。 ‥‥１週間前になっています。
English: Not with the compensation... Just with the date. This is dated a week ago.

Japanese: マックスさん！
English: Max!

Japanese: ギャラの交渉は１週間前、 とっくに終わっていたんです！
English: You finished your contract negotiations a week ago!

Japanese: ‥‥ゴ‥‥ゴージャスゥゥゥ！
English: F-Fa-Fab-Fabulous!!

Japanese: オーケイ。話すよ。
English: Alright. I'll tell you the truth.

Japanese: あの夜！　呼び出されたんだ、 団長室に。
English: That night... The Ringmaster called me to his room!

Japanese: 呼び出された‥‥？ どうしてですか？
English: He called you? Why did he do that?

Japanese: それはちょっと‥‥ 個人的な話だよハニイ。
English: Sorry sweetie... That's private.

Japanese: （団長に呼び出された‥‥ 何か問題を起こしたのか？）
English: (The Ringmaster called him... I wonder if there was some sort of problem?)

Japanese: もしかして、マックスさん。
English: Um... Max? Perhaps you could share with me what you two spoke about?

Japanese: うう‥‥できれば そのハナシはしたくないなあ‥‥。
English: Well... Not if I don't have to...

Japanese: 団長に呼び出されたのは、 この件じゃないですか？
English: Isn't this why the Ringmaster called you into his room that night?

Japanese: そんな目で見ないでくれよ。 ぼくもツラい。
English: Don't look at me like that! This isn't easy for me you know!

Japanese: どうですか！　マックスさん。
English: How 'bout it Max?

Japanese: どうもこうもないだろう。 ボクはどうすればいいんだい？
English: How 'bout what? What do you expect me to do with this?

Japanese: そんなモノを見せられて‥‥。 なんなら、消してみせようか？
English: Lemme guess... You're showing me that so I can make it disappear for you... Right?

Japanese: い、いやいや。それは困ります。 （もう一度、考えてみよう！）
English: No no no no no... PLEASE DON'T MAKE IT DISAPPEAR!! (Hmm... I gotta try again!)

Japanese: 呼ばれたのは、 コイツのせいじゃないですか？
English: Isn't this why you were called to the Ringmaster's room that night?

Japanese: ど‥‥どこでそれを？
English: Wh-Where did you get that!?

Japanese: 食堂に決まってるでしょう。
English: The cafeteria... But you already knew that didn't you?

Japanese: ‥‥‥‥！ そそっかしいもんでね。
English: O-Of course...

Japanese: 落として 割っちゃったんだよ、それ。
English: It fell and broke on the floor.

Japanese: （どうやら、まだカンネン していないみたいだな‥‥）
English: (He's still hiding something else.)

Japanese: マックスさん。
English: Max.

Japanese: な、ナニかなハニイ。
English: What is it my sweetie?

Japanese: 落として割れたんじゃない。 あなたは、このビンを使って‥‥
English: It didn't fall and break on the floor. You used this bottle to...

Japanese: もうそろそろ、 やめておこうよハニイ。
English: Will you give up on this... Please... Sweetie...
...Huh?

Japanese: いいかげんにしないと、 そのビンで殴りつけるぜ。
English: If you don't shape up, I'm gonna beat you over the head with that bottle!

Japanese: （やれやれ‥‥。 ちがったみたいだな）
English: (What did I do? Hmm... I must be on the wrong track...)

Japanese: 言っただろ。落として 割ったんだよ、そのビンは。
English: I already told you! It fell to the floor and broke.

Japanese: （そうじゃないはずだ！） ‥‥マックスさん。
English: (He won't tell me the truth!) Max.

Japanese: ベ、ベン‥‥。
English: B-Ben...

Japanese: 殴ったんですよね。コイツで 彼のアタマを、思いっきり。
English: You nailed him over the head with this bottle, didn't you?

Japanese: だから呼ばれたんですよね？ 団長に。
English: And that's why you got called to the Ringmaster's room that night.

Japanese: んゴオオォォージャスゴージャス！ まさに大魔術だね！
English: F-F-F-FAAAABBBUUULLOUS! You might as well be a magician!!

Japanese: ベ、ベン‥‥か‥‥。
English: B-B-Ben... H-He...

Japanese: 彼と、何かあったんじゃ ないですか？
English: You had a run-in with Ben?

Japanese: べ、ベツにそんな。 してないさ、ケンカなんて！
English: I didn't do anything to Ben. I-I didn't get in a fight with him!

Japanese: ははあ‥‥やっぱりケンカを していたわけですね？
English: Ah-ha! So you're admitting that you did have a fight with someone!?

Japanese: なな、なんだよ、その目は！ ダレもそんなこと言ってないぞ！
English: Wh-Why are you looking at me all funny!? No one said anything like that!!

Japanese: ボクたちがスゴいケンカをした という証拠でもあるのかい？
English: Do you have any proof that we got into a knockdown drag out brawl?

Japanese: ヤレヤレ。キミもベンは 知ってるだろう？
English: You just don't quit! You know Ben, don't you?

Japanese: ヤツとケンカなんか するワケないじゃないか。
English: What reason in the world would I have for getting into a fight with him?

Japanese: ほとんどしゃべったコトも ないんだからさ。
English: I've hardly ever said a word to him.

Japanese: ‥‥でも、そう考えると スジが通るんですよ。
English: Well... It fits in with the chain of events.

Japanese: しつこいね。‥‥それなら、 証拠を見せてほしいな。
English: You are so belligerent... If that's the case, how about you show me some proof.

Japanese: ‥‥これが証拠ですよ。
English: This proves it.

Japanese: ど‥‥どこでそれを？
English: Whe-Where did you get that?

Japanese: 食堂に決まってるじゃないですか。 ‥‥マックスさん。
English: Isn't it obvious that I found it in the cafeteria, Max?

Japanese: これで殴ったんですね？ ベンさんのアタマを。
English: You busted Ben over the head with this bottle, did you not?

Japanese: だから、ビンは割れた。そして あなたは、団長に呼び出された！
English: That's how the bottle broke. And that's why you were called to the Ringmaster's room.

Japanese: んゴオオォォージャスゴージャス！ ‥‥さらに、ゴージャス！
English: F-F-F-FAAAABBBUUULOUSSS! ABSOLUTELY F-F-F-FAAAABBBUUULOUSSS!!

Japanese: 同日　某時刻 タチミ・サーカス　正門前
English: December 28 Berry Big Circus Circus Entrance

Japanese: ‥‥また来ちゃったね。
English: We're here again...

Japanese: ああ。今度はシゴトだけど。
English: Yep. But this time we are here for work.

Japanese: （事件が起きて間がないため、 警官たちが動き回っている）
English: (It hasn't been that long since the crime, so the police are still on the scene.)

Japanese: とりあえず、事件のコト 知ってそうな人、探そうよ。
English: Let's find someone who might know something about what happened.

Japanese: そうだね。
English: Sounds like a plan.

Japanese: 同日　某時刻 タチミ・サーカス　正門前
English: December 28 Berry Big Circus Circus Entrance

Japanese: ‥‥あれ。 なるほどくん、あそこ。
English: Huh? Hey Nick! Look over there!

Japanese: ん？
English: What?

Japanese: だれかいるよ！ あのー、すみませーん。
English: There's someone over there! Ex-Excuse me!

Japanese: こんにちは。
English: Hello.

Japanese: カンゼンに ムシされてるよ。
English: Wow! He sure is a quiet one!

Japanese: スミマセン！
English: Excuse me!!

Japanese: え。あ。お。 ボ、ボクですか‥‥
English: Wha... Ha... Huh? M-Me?

Japanese: そうです。 このサーカスのヒトですよね？
English: Yes. You work at the circus don't you?

Japanese: い。いや。 ボク、そういうアレじゃ‥‥
English: N-No. I'm just your everyday average Joe.

Japanese: あれ？ ちがうんですか？
English: An average Joe who just happens to hang out at the circus? I don't think so.

Japanese: お。あ。いや、 ボクあれです。無関係で‥‥
English: Y-Yes I am. I've got nothing to do with what's going on here.

Japanese: （ウソつけ。そんなカッコした 一般人がいるかよ！）
English: (He's lying. Like any regular person would hang around the circus... Dressed like that!)

Japanese: ぼくは、弁護士の成歩堂です。
English: I'm an attorney. My name is Phoenix Wright.

Japanese: あ。あたしは霊媒師の真宵です。
English: I'm a spirit medium. My name is Maya.

Japanese: え。う。お。 ボ、ボクは通りすがりの‥‥
English: Well... I... Um... Just happened to be... Umm... Passing by...

Japanese: どうせあなたも、 “なんとか師”なんでしょう？
English: I don't suppose you happen to be some kind of carny?

Japanese: う。あ。その。 ‥‥ふ、腹話術師やってます‥‥
English: Not a c-c-carny... I-I'm a p-performer. Actually, I'm a v-v-v-ventriloquist.

Japanese: ふくわじゅつ‥‥
English: Ventriloquist?

Japanese: き、き、き、き、き、き、き、き、 木住　勉（きずみべん）です‥‥
English: He-he-he-he-he-he-he... I-I-I'm Benjamin Wo-Wo-Wo-Woodman...

Japanese: キズミさん、ていうんですかあ。
English: You're last name is Woodman? *snicker*

Japanese: え、ええ。あ。お。 み、みなさんは“ベン”と‥‥
English: Y-Yes... T-T-That's right... But e-everyone c-c-calls me B-B-B-B-B-Ben.

Japanese: あー、はいはい。 源氏名、ってヤツですね？
English: Ah... Yes yes yes... That's your alias, right?

Japanese: “芸名”、ね。
English: I believe they call it a stage name.

Japanese: あの。ベンさん？
English: Excuse me, Ben?

Japanese: う。お。 ぼ、ボク‥‥ですか‥‥
English: Uh... Yes? You mean... Me?

Japanese: 事件のコト、 聞かせてほしいんですけど。
English: About the murder. I'd like to talk to you about the details, if I may.

Japanese: い、いや。 ぼ、ボクはアレ、その‥‥
English: R-Really... I'm just a regular normal guy...

Japanese: そういうアレじゃ。 その。お。う‥‥
English: I don't k-k-now... A-a-a-a...

Japanese: （なんか、 ミョーにイライラするな）
English: (This guy's so nervous, he's creeping me out.)

Japanese: な、なるほどくん。 笑って笑って。
English: Nick. Cheer up! Just try and smile!

Japanese: あの人のコト、 聞かせてくださいよ。
English: Would you mind telling us something about Max?

Japanese: マックス・ギャラクティカ。
English: Maximillion Galactica.

Japanese: ま。ま。ま。 マックス‥‥ですか‥‥
English: Ma-Ma-Ma-Max?

Japanese: う。お。い‥‥ ひ‥‥どい‥‥ヤツ‥‥
English: H-H-H-He's... N-N-N-Not... V-Very... N-N-Nice.

Japanese: （“ヒドいヤツだ”って 言いたいのか‥‥？）
English: (Did he just say that Max is "Not Very Nice"?)

Japanese: お。‥‥あ、 アタマが‥‥イタイ‥‥。
English: O... O... O... Oww... My... H-H-Head... Hurts.

Japanese: （‥‥だいじょうぶか？ このヒト‥‥）
English: (Yikes. I hope he is OK. It sounds like he just popped a gasket...)

Japanese: ベンさんって、 腹話術師なんですよねー？
English: Ben, so you're a ventriloquist?

Japanese: え。う。い、いや、 ボクはそのアレ、そんな‥‥。
English: I-I-I-I'm... J-J-J-Just A-A... R-R-R-Regular... G-G-Guy...

Japanese: さっき そうだって言ってたでしょう！
English: You already told us that you were a ventriloquist!!
Oh... Y-Y-Yes...

Japanese: ダメだよなるほどくん！ 大きな声だしちゃ。
English: Nick! Don't yell at him! You can't do that!!

Japanese: なんか、ハラ立つんだよな‥‥。
English: I can't help it! He's making me nervous!!

Japanese: ちょっと、 見せてくださいよ。腹話術。
English: Ben, do you mind showing me some of your skills as a ventriloquist?

Japanese: う。お。お。ちょ、 ちょっと今は、その‥‥。
English: W-W-Well... I-I-I... R-R-R-Right... N-N-Now... M-M-My... P-P-P...

Japanese: え。う。お。お‥‥ （こっちまでウツっちまった）
English: A-A-A-A-Ah... I-I-I-I-I W-W-W-W-Why... (Urk!! He's contagious!!)

Japanese: あの、ちょっと 見ていただけますか？
English: Would you mind taking a look at this?

Japanese: う。‥‥お、あ‥‥ ボ、ボクはその。ううう。
English: Uh... Umm... Uh... I-I-I-I...

Japanese: ‥‥やっぱり、いいです。
English: I guess we won't need you to look at this after all.

Japanese: あの、ちょっと 見ていただけますか？
English: Would you mind taking a look at this?

Japanese: う。‥‥お、あ‥‥ ボ、ボクはその。ううう。
English: Uh... Umm... Uh... I-I-I-I...

Japanese: ‥‥やっぱり、いいです。
English: I guess we won't need you to look at this after all.

Japanese: 同日　某時刻 タチミ・サーカス　正門前
English: December 28 Berry Big Circus Circus Entrance

Japanese: あれ。‥‥いなくなっちゃったね、 ベンさん。
English: Huh? Ben's not here anymore!

Japanese: うーん。聞きたいこと、 あったのに‥‥。
English: Yeah... I wanted to ask him something.

Japanese: サムいからね。テントの中に 入っちゃったのかも。
English: It's cold out... He's probably in the tent.

Japanese: 同日　某時刻 宿舎前　広場
English: December 28 Lodging House Plaza

Japanese: ここは‥‥サーカスの人たちが 泊まっている宿舎、みたいだね。
English: This seems to be a dorm where all the performers in the circus stay...

Japanese: え！　じゃあ、あのユカイな ピエロさんとか、いるのかな。
English: Really!? So that stoogey clown should be here, huh? He's so kooky!

Japanese: おッ！　アンタたち。
English: Ahhh! It's you two!

Japanese: あ。イトノコ刑事さん！
English: Oh... Detective Gumshoe!

Japanese: ‥‥現場に行くと、いっつも 見るカオッスねー、アンタたちは。
English: I always see you hanging around when I'm working a crime scene, pal.

Japanese: 刑事さんもがんばってますね！ おシゴト。
English: You always seem to be working so hard, Detective.

Japanese: ベツに、がんばりたくないッス。 事件が勝手にがんばってるッス。
English: I'd rather not be working hard, but with crime you don't make your own hours.

Japanese: せっかくサーカスに来たんだから、 猛獣とか綱渡りとか見たいッス。
English: If I have to be at the circus anyways, I want to see the lion tamer and the tightrope.

Japanese: でも、自分がどこへ行っても、 だしもののメニューは同じ。
English: However, no matter where I go, the show is always the same...

Japanese: ‥‥死体ッス。
English: Dead body. Stage left.

Japanese: な、なるほどくん。 ‥‥グチりだしたよ！
English: Nick! Nick! He complained!!

Japanese: キケンだ。 さっさと仕事の話をしよう。
English: Heh heh... That's a rarity. Let's get back to business now, OK?

Japanese: このサーカスの団長さんが 殺害されたんですよね？
English: The Ringmaster of the circus was murdered, wasn't he?

Japanese: そッス。きのうの晩、 午後１０時ごろのことッス。
English: Yep. Last night around 10 PM.

Japanese: きっと、サムかったッス。 ‥‥かわいそうに。
English: He died outside in the cold. A pretty sad way to go out if you ask me, pal.

Japanese: ‥‥サムかった？
English: It was rather cold.

Japanese: 事件はここで起こったッス。 死体は、そこにたおれていたッス。
English: This is the scene of the crime, pal. The body was found right over there.

Japanese: ちょうど、アンタが 立っているあたりッス。
English: Right about where you are standing now.

Japanese: きゃああああああああああああッ！
English: AHHHHHHHHHHH!!

Japanese: はっはっはっ。 カルいジョークッス。
English: Ho! Ho! Ho! Surprised you, didn't I?

Japanese: 笑えません！
English: I'm not laughing!

Japanese: あの。ところで、 被害者は‥‥どうやって？
English: Excuse me, but do you mind telling me what happened to the victim?

Japanese: 頭ガイコツが砕けるほど、 こっぴどく殴られたッス。
English: He was killed by a blow to the noggin, pal.

Japanese: ひゃあ‥‥
English: Yeep!

Japanese: わかりやすい事件ッス。 発見も早かったッスから。
English: It's pretty clear cut as far as murders go. He was discovered quickly.

Japanese: ただ‥‥。
English: But...

Japanese: ただ‥‥？
English: But?

Japanese: 奇妙な点があるッス。 １つだけ。
English: There's just one thing that doesn't quite fit.

Japanese: おッ！　やっぱり、 ナゾが１つぐらいなくっちゃね！
English: Hah! There always seems to be something that doesn't quite fit!!

Japanese: 明日の法廷ですけど‥‥ 検事は、だれが？
English: Do you know who will be the prosecutor in court tomorrow?

Japanese: もちろん、狩魔検事ッス。
English: Of course. It will be Ms. von Karma.

Japanese: うう‥‥。また ムチでたたかれるのか‥‥。
English: Uhhh... She isn't gonna hit me with her whip again, is she?

Japanese: アンタは法廷だけだから、 まだいいッス。
English: What do you have to worry about? You only have to see her in court!

Japanese: あの検事が来てから、警察署は ムチの音が絶えないッス。
English: When she shows up at the precinct, the sound of that whip never ends, pal.

Japanese: ねえ、イトノコ刑事さん。 狩魔検事はいいんですけど‥‥、
English: Detective Gumshoe... That's enough about Von Karma. What about that guy?

Japanese: あのヒトはどうしたんですか？
English: What is he up to?

Japanese: あのヒト‥‥？
English: That guy?

Japanese: ミツルギ検事に 決まってるじゃないですか！
English: What happened to Edgeworth?

Japanese: なるほどくんのライバルといえば、 あのヒトでしょ！
English: You know! The Edgeworth that's Nick's rival!

Japanese: あたしが里に帰っているあいだに、 いったい、何があったんですか？
English: What in the world happened when I went back home!?

Japanese: み、御剣検事‥‥。 あの、聞いてないッスか？
English: M-Mr. Edgeworth... You haven't heard what happened to him?

Japanese: なるほどくん、 教えてくれないんですよ！
English: Nick won't tell me!

Japanese: うう‥‥自分のクチからも、 ちょっと言えないッス。
English: Well, to be honest... I'm not at liberty to tell you either.

Japanese: あのヒトはもう‥‥ いない、としか。
English: Let's just say he's not around anymore.

Japanese: い、いない‥‥！
English: He's not around!?!?

Japanese: なるほどくん！ どういうことッ？
English: Nick! What does he mean Mr. Edgeworth isn't around!?

Japanese: 聞いたとおりだよ。
English: Exactly what he said. He's not around.

Japanese: ‥‥もう、アイツはいないんだ。 その名前は二度と言わないで。
English: Edgeworth is gone... Don't say his name again, OK?

Japanese: な‥‥なるほどくん‥‥？
English: N-Nick?

Japanese: ‥‥なんですか？　この事件の “奇妙な点”って。
English: What was this one thing that just didn't quite fit? The thing you mentioned earlier.

Japanese: 足跡ッス。
English: Footprints, pal. Footprints.

Japanese: あしあと‥‥
English: Footprints?

Japanese: ‥‥これが現場の写真ッス。
English: Look at this picture of the crime scene...

Japanese: なんですか？　この、 死体の下にある“木箱”は？
English: What's this? This wooden box under the body?

Japanese: さあー、わからねッス。
English: No clue, pal.

Japanese: 鑑識の連中が持って帰って、 今、調べてるッス。
English: Some forensics experts took it back and are examining it now.

Japanese: で？　で？　イトノコさん。 足跡のナゾって？
English: And... And... What is so mysterious about the footprints?

Japanese: まま。落ちつくッス。 写真の足跡を、よく見るッス。
English: Whoa. Calm down now. Take a good look at the footprints in this picture.

Japanese: ‥‥被害者の足跡がありますね。
English: The victim's footprints are on the scene.

Japanese: それはいいッス。問題は‥‥
English: That's right, pal. The problem is...

Japanese: ‥‥！ 犯人の足跡がないよ！
English: The killer's footprints aren't there!!

Japanese: そッス。
English: Bingo.

Japanese: 犯人がどこから来て、 どこへ消えたのか‥‥？
English: Where did the killer come from, and where did the killer run off to?

Japanese: まさか、空を飛ぶハズも ないッスからねえ‥‥
English: Obviously, there is no way the killer committed this crime while flying.

Japanese: 空を飛ぶ‥‥犯人‥‥
English: A flying... Criminal?

Japanese: （そのとき‥‥アタマの中に、 １つの光景が浮かんだ‥‥）
English: (That's when something just clicked in my head...)

Japanese: まま、まさかね！ そーんなコト、あるワケないって。
English: T-There's no way! Flying is impossible!

Japanese: そ、そうだよなあ。 いくらなんでもなあ。はははは。
English: That's right. Flying is impossible! Absolutely impossible! Haha...

Japanese: ナニ、チカラなく笑ってるッス？
English: What's with the hollow laugh, pal?

Japanese: い、いえ。な、なんでもないッス。
English: I meant nothing by it, pal...

Japanese: （とりあえず‥‥）
English: (Better stated, it means I don't want to talk about it.)

Japanese: （さりげなく、マックスの 情報を聞き出せないかな‥‥？）
English: (Maybe I can get some info about Max out of him...)

Japanese: 証拠品《現場写真》のデータを 法廷記録にファイルした。
English: Crime Photo added to the Court Record.

Japanese: あの‥‥目撃者って、 いったい‥‥？
English: Umm... How about any eyewitnesses...?

Japanese: おぉっと！　そいつはダメッス。
English: Ho! Ho! Ho! You know I'm not going to tell you that!

Japanese: 教えるワケにはいかねッス。 検察側のキリフダッスからねェ。
English: That's the prosecution's trump card!!

Japanese: はあ。しかたない、か‥‥。
English: Hmm... Oh well...

Japanese: あ！　そうだ、アンタたち！
English: Oh! I just remembered!!
What?

Japanese: 言っておくッスが、この先の 宿舎には、入っちゃダメッスよ。
English: I forgot to mention that you two are barred from entering that lodging house.

Japanese: ‥‥？　どうしてですか？
English: Why is that?

Japanese: い、いやッ！　ベツにッ！ フト思い浮かんだだけッス。
English: Oh... No reason! Just something I remembered to tell you.

Japanese: ‥‥どうやら、目撃者は 宿舎にいるみたいだね。
English: It must be because there's an eyewitness inside that Lodging House.

Japanese: 行ってみようか。
English: Let's check it out!

Japanese: ダメッスよッ！
English: Oh no you don't, pal!

Japanese: そのバッジなら、 もう見あきたッス。
English: C'mon. You've flashed that badge at me so many times it doesn't work anymore!

Japanese: たまには、他のバッジを つけてみたらどうッス？
English: Why don't you try wearing a different badge every now and again?

Japanese: あ。あたし、トノサマンバッジ なら持ってるけど？
English: Well... I do have a Steel Samurai Badge with me. How about that one?

Japanese: ‥‥刑事さんがトノサマン手帳を 持ち歩くなら、ぼくもそうします。
English: I'll only wear it if Detective Gumshoe carries a Steel Samurai Police Badge.

Japanese: トノサマン手帳？ もちろん持ってるよ！
English: Then it's a deal! I hear that Detective Gumshoe has that very badge!

Japanese: ‥‥いや、キタイするような目で 見られても困るッスけど‥‥。
English: What!? Don't look at me like that!! You're making me nervous!

Japanese: だからぁ、証拠にカンする情報は あげられないッスゥ。
English: You know I can't tell you two anything about the evidence we have gathered!

Japanese: けち。
English: Stingy!

Japanese: ‥‥ぐぎッ！
English: Stingy!?

Japanese: そういうシンプルなヒトコトが 一番、シミるッス‥‥。
English: When you put it so bluntly, it kinda hurts my feelings, pal...

Japanese: どうもこのサーカスでは、 テッテー的にキラわれてるッス。
English: It looks like Max is the most unpopular guy in the circus tent.

Japanese: もう、評判のワルいこと ワルいこと‥‥。
English: You know what they say... A bad attitude follows you everywhere...

Japanese: （留置所でも、みんなのこと 見下してたみたいだしな‥‥）
English: (Hmm, he's a bit arrogant, but he didn't seem that bad.)

Japanese: でも！　評判がワルいからって、 ハンニンってワケじゃないでしょ！
English: But just because someone has a bad attitude doesn't make them a criminal.

Japanese: 評判だけじゃないッス。 ‥‥しっかりあるッスよ、証拠も。
English: It's not just his attitude... I've got proof, pal!

Japanese: え。
English: Huh?

Japanese: 現場に、コイツが落ちていたッス。
English: He left something at the scene of the crime!

Japanese: あの手品師のトレードマークッス。
English: One of his magician's trademarks!

Japanese: なんでも、特注の シルクハットらしいッス。
English: An incredibly well-made silk hat.

Japanese: カッコイイかざりが ついてますからねー。
English: Well it does have very classy decorative elements.

Japanese: 証拠品《シルクハット》のデータを 法廷記録にファイルした。
English: Silk Hat added to the Court Record.

Japanese: マント、シルクハット、ムネの 白いバラが、ヤツのシンボルッス。
English: Max uses a cloak, silk hat, and white roses as his signature symbols.

Japanese: ‥‥ありがちなシンボルだなあ。
English: Pretty mundane, aren't they?

Japanese: いいんだよ！ わかりやすいほうが！
English: Who cares if they are mundane!? At least they are easy to understand!!

Japanese: （怒られた‥‥）
English: (I must have hit a nerve...)

Japanese: それに。‥‥今回も、いたッス。
English: That's what he said.

Japanese: な‥‥ナニがですか？
English: Who said?

Japanese: 目撃者ッス。
English: The eyewitness.

Japanese: えッ！
English: Eh!?

Japanese: そ、その話、 くわしく聞かせてください！
English: T-Tell us about the eyewitness!!

Japanese: ‥‥なんか、ミョーに つかれたカオしてるッスねー。
English: I'm making a really strange tired looking face here...

Japanese: そうかなあ。 ‥‥生まれつきじゃないですか？
English: Hmm... Are you sure you weren't born looking like that?

Japanese: うう‥‥もっと ハツラツと生きたいッス。
English: Uh-uh... I wish I was more lively...

Japanese: つかれたッス。
English: Right now, I'm just tired.

Japanese: ムリせず、つかれきったカオで 行きましょうよ！
English: Well, there's not much you can do about that, so you just gotta keep on being tired!

Japanese: そッスね！
English: You're right!

Japanese: （前向きにまとまったな‥‥）
English: (Glad I stayed out of that one...)

Japanese: いやー、しかし霊媒って あるものなんスねえ。
English: Being a spirit medium is quite an accomplishment...

Japanese: ワカいのに、たいしたものッス。
English: And you're so young too! That's really something!!

Japanese: でも、しばらく霊媒は お休みしようかと思って。
English: Actually, I've been thinking of taking a break from channeling.

Japanese: そうなの？
English: Really?

Japanese: また、あんな事故が起こったら イヤだから。
English: I don't want to have another incident like last time.

Japanese: 打倒・ナルホドーで メラメラ燃えてるッス。
English: You're going down this time, pal!

Japanese: そ、そうなんですか？
English: Oh... Is that right?

Japanese: もう、毎日１０００回。 すぶりをしてるッス。
English: She's been practicing 1000 cracks a day, pal.

Japanese: すぶり、って、もしかして‥‥？
English: Cracks? Wait... You don't mean cracks of the...

Japanese: そッス。ムチッス。
English: Yep. Cracks of the WHIP!

Japanese: うううう‥‥。
English: Uhhh...

Japanese: サーカスの芸人さんたちに 事情聴取をしたッスが‥‥、
English: I've gotten affidavits from most of the performers at this circus.

Japanese: ホント、ヘンなのばっかりッスね。
English: They are certainly a strange bunch of characters.

Japanese: そうですか？
English: You don't say?

Japanese: ま。アンタほどじゃないッスけど。
English: Well, not stranger than you I suppose.

Japanese: ‥‥ヒドい。
English: That was cold...

Japanese: じょじょじょ、冗談ッス‥‥。
English: I-I'm sorry. I was just messing around.

Japanese: 同日　某時刻 宿舎前　広場
English: December 28 Lodging House Plaza

Japanese: あれ。イトノコ刑事さん、 いなくなっちゃったね。
English: Huh? Detective Gumshoe took off already.

Japanese: うーん。しばらく ほったらかしておいたからな。
English: Yep. Just leave him alone for a while, OK Maya?

Japanese: さびしくなって 帰ったんじゃないか、警察。
English: I'm sure he just got lonely and headed back to the precinct.

Japanese: 同日　某時刻 タチミ・サーカス　テント内
English: December 28 Berry Big Circus Big Top

Japanese: ‥‥意外とせまいんだなあ、 サーカスのステージって。
English: The circus stage sure doesn't look this small from out in the audience...

Japanese: へええ。みんな、こんなところで 曲芸とかしてるんだねー。
English: Wow... This is where they all perform, isn't it?

Japanese: ほら、なるほどくん！ トンボ返りトンボ返り。
English: Nick! Do some somersaults!

Japanese: できないよ。
English: I'm not doing any somersaults.

Japanese: なーんだ。 見かけだおしだなあ。
English: Why not!? You look like you'd be great at it!

Japanese: （どんな見かけだ‥‥？）
English: (Why do I look like I'd be great at somersaults!?)

Japanese: グルルルルル‥‥
English: Grrrrrrrrrrrrrr...

Japanese: なに？　なるほどくん。
English: Huh? Nick?

Japanese: ぼくじゃないぞ。
English: It wasn't me.

Japanese: グルルルルル‥‥ ガオオオオォォォォッッッ！
English: Grrrrrrrrrrr... Grawwwwwww!!

Japanese: ト、ト、ト、ト、トラだよ！
English: T-T-T-T-T-T-T... TIGER!!

Japanese: こ、こ、こ、こ、こっち来るぞ！
English: H-H-H-He's c-c-coming this way!!

Japanese: グルグルグルグル‥‥ ガオオオオォォォォッッッ！
English: Grrrrrrrrr... Grawwwwwww!!

Japanese: う、うわああああああああっ！
English: AHHHHHHHHHHH!!

Japanese: なるほどくん！　死んじゃイヤ！ ‥‥なるほどくーん！
English: Nick! You're too young to die! NICK!!

Japanese: ステイ！　ラトー！　ステイ！
English: STAY! STAY! HEEL!

Japanese: グルルルルルルルル‥‥
English: Grrrrrrrrr...

Japanese: （‥‥し、死んだワケじゃ なさそうだな‥‥）
English: (I'm still here... I'm not dead, yet!!)

Japanese: な‥‥なるほどくん！ なるほどくん！　だいじょうぶ？
English: N-Nick! Nick! Are you OK?

Japanese: あははっ。ビックリした？
English: Ahahaha! Scared ya didn't I?

Japanese: カワイイでしょー。 ラトー、っていうんだよ！
English: Regent is such a cute tiger! Isn't he!?

Japanese: ‥‥どしたの？ ２人とも、だまっちゃって。
English: What's the matter? You two sure are quiet.

Japanese: “どしたの”じゃないッ！
English: Don't "What's the matter?" me!

Japanese: な、なるほどくん、 死ぬトコだったじゃないの！
English: N-Nick... He almost died there!!

Japanese: えー。そんなコトないよお。
English: Hah! He wasn't anywhere close to getting hurt, let alone dying!

Japanese: この子、ヒトはかまないモン。 ‥‥めったに。
English: This little tiger hardly ever bites people.

Japanese: それに、ナマでトラとあそべる なんて、フツー、できないよ？
English: And besides, people normally never get to play with a wild tiger, right?

Japanese: よかったねー。
English: So if you think about it, you're actually really lucky!
Huh!?

Japanese: よかったよね。‥‥ね？
English: You agree, don't you?
I guess...

Japanese: なな、ナニうなずいてんの、 なるほどくん！
English: W-W-W-What do you mean you guess!? Why are you agreeing with her?

Japanese: あー、そのコスチューム。
English: Woohoo!! Your costume...

Japanese: え。
English: Eh?

Japanese: カワイイねー。 ミリカも着てみたいなー。
English: It's cute. I wanna try it on!!

Japanese: あ‥‥こ、これ？　こすちゅーむ、 っていうか、装束‥‥
English: C-Costume? You mean my clothes...?

Japanese: 今度、ミリカにも着せてよ？ ‥‥ね？
English: You don't mind letting me try it on, right?

Japanese: あ‥‥いいけど。
English: Uhh... I guess not...

Japanese: ホント！ すッごいウレシイなー！
English: REALLY!? Hehehehehe!! You're the best!

Japanese: （うーん‥‥スッカリ なごんでしまった‥‥）
English: (Wow... The tables turned quickly on that one. So much for the tiger thing...)

Japanese: あ！　自己紹介、 まだだったよね。
English: Oh! I forgot to introduce myself.

Japanese: ミリカ、っていうの。 猛獣使いなの！
English: I'm Regina Berry... The renowned animal tamer of the Berry Big Circus!

Japanese: あたしはね、綾里　真宵。 霊媒師だよ。
English: My name's Maya Fey. I'm a spirit medium.

Japanese: 成歩堂　龍一。弁護士だ。
English: Phoenix Wright. Attorney at law.

Japanese: （猛獣使いと並べられると、 ぼくたちまで芸人みたいだな）
English: (When you put us up next to an animal tamer, I bet we really look odd!)

Japanese: よろしくねっ！
English: Nice to meet ya!

Japanese: ここ、こちらこそ。
English: Uhh... Likewise...

Japanese: ね。ね。ミリカちゃん。 きのうのコト、何か知ってる？
English: Hey Regina... What do you know about what happened last night?

Japanese: あ。もしかしてアレ？ ‥‥サツジン事件。
English: You mean the murder...?

Japanese: そうそう。それ。
English: Uh huh.

Japanese: ミリカのパパが 死んじゃったヤツ。
English: My dad was murdered.

Japanese: そうそう。 ‥‥って、ナニィ！
English: I can't imagine how hard this must be for you... (Urk! That was insensitive!)

Japanese: あ、あの。団長さんって、 ミリカちゃんの‥‥？
English: That's right! The Ringmaster was your...

Japanese: うん。パパ。
English: Yep. The Ringmaster was my dad.

Japanese: そ‥‥そうだったんだ。 ゴメンね。
English: I'm so sorry about what happened to him...

Japanese: ゴメンね‥‥って、何が？
English: Why do you say you're sorry?

Japanese: え。
English: Eh?

Japanese: んーとね。きのうの夜は、 みんなここで練習してたんだよ。
English: Anyways... Everyone was here practicing last night.

Japanese: パパもいたの？
English: Even your dad?

Japanese: うん。みんないたよ。 ‥‥でね。１０時に解散したの。
English: Yes. Everyone was here. We finished up around 10 PM.

Japanese: みんな、バラバラになって。 ミリカだけ、ちょっと残ってたの。
English: After that, everyone went off on their own. I was the only one who stayed around here.

Japanese: どうして？
English: Why did you do that?

Japanese: ラトーとあそんでたんだ。
English: I was playing with Regent.

Japanese: （ラトー‥‥あのケダモノか）
English: (Regent... So she was with that beast...)

Japanese: そのうち、ケーサツが来てね。 行ってみたら、死んでたの。パパ。
English: That's when the police showed up. When they took me to check things out, Dad was dead.

Japanese: （パパが死んだってのに、なんで こんなにケロッとしてるんだ？）
English: (For someone who's father was just murdered, she seems awfully perky...)

Japanese: （もう少し情報がほしいな‥‥ パパについて）
English: (I wish she would tell us more about her dad...)

Japanese: ね。ね。猛獣使いなんだよね。 スゴいなー。
English: That's incredible that you are an animal tamer!

Japanese: えー、そうかなあ。
English: If you say so...

Japanese: だって、コワいでしょ？
English: It has to be really scary!

Japanese: コワい？　どうして？
English: Scary? Why?

Japanese: え。
English: Huh?

Japanese: ラトーはね。 とってもカワイイの。
English: Regent isn't scary! He's cute!

Japanese: レオンがいなくなってから、 ミリカのイチバンのお友だち。
English: Ever since Léon died, Regent has been my best friend.

Japanese: レオン‥‥？
English: Léon?

Japanese: うん。ライオン。
English: Yes. Léon the lion.

Japanese: （ライオンのレオンに、 トラのラトー、ねえ‥‥）
English: (Léon the lion... Regent and Regina... Interesting name choices...)

Japanese: レオン‥‥死んじゃったの？
English: Léon... He died?

Japanese: うん。殺されちゃった。 ‥‥パパに。
English: Yes. Actually he was killed. My dad killed him.
What!?

Japanese: な、なんで？
English: Why did he do that?

Japanese: わかんないの。 ‥‥なんでかな？
English: I'm not sure why he did it.

Japanese: （そんなムジャキな目で 見つめられても困るけど‥‥）
English: (It's tough not to get charmed when she looks at you with those innocent eyes...)

Japanese: ねえ、教えてよー。 何を悩んでるの？
English: Regina... What's the matter? What's on your mind?

Japanese: ふふ‥‥。 じゃあ、真宵ちゃんだけだよ。
English: *giggle* I'll tell you Maya... But just you.

Japanese: え。
English: Ah!

Japanese: んーとね。‥‥ごにょごにょ。
English: Umm... Well... *mumble* *mumble*

Japanese: えーっ。ホントに！
English: What!? REALLY!?!?

Japanese: さらにね。‥‥ごにょごにょ。
English: And then... *mumble* *mumble*

Japanese: うっわあ。 スゴいなあミリカちゃん！
English: Oh my! That's incredible Regina!!

Japanese: なな、泣かないで！ なるほどくん。
English: C'mon Nick. There's no reason to pout!

Japanese: ‥‥いいんだ、ぼくなんか。
English: Don't worry about me...

Japanese: あのね。ミリカちゃん、 愛の告白をされたんだって。
English: Regina told me that someone professed their love to her!

Japanese: こ‥‥コクハク‥‥？
English: P-P-P-Professed their love!?

Japanese: しかも！　あのマックス・ ギャラクティカにだよ！
English: Not only that! It was Maximillion Galactica!

Japanese: （‥‥いくつ盗んだんだ？ アイツのハート‥‥）
English: (I wonder how many people have stolen one of his hearts anyways...?)

Japanese: でね、でね。同じ日に、別の ヒトからも告白されたんだって！
English: And then, on the exact same day, another person professed their love for her as well!!

Japanese: はああ。‥‥だれ？
English: What? Who was it!?

Japanese: リロ、ってヒト。
English: Someone named Trilo.

Japanese: リロ‥‥？
English: Trilo...?

Japanese: テノール歌手だって。
English: Apparently he is a tenor who sings in the circus.

Japanese: （まだ、会ってないな‥‥）
English: (Hmm... Haven't met him yet.)

Japanese: モテモテだよねー、 ミリカちゃん。
English: Regina seems to be quite the hit with the men in the circus!

Japanese: 彼女、フシギな ミリョクがあるからなあ。
English: She must have some sort of strange power over them!

Japanese: ホントにね。
English: You're not kidding. Two people in one day!

Japanese: あたしも したくなってきたもん。コクハク。
English: Even I want to profess my love for her!

Japanese: （‥‥じつは、ぼくもだ）
English: (Me too! She's so cute...)

Japanese: ふふ‥‥。
English: *giggle*

Japanese: マックスのでしょ？ そのシルクハット。
English: This silk hat is Max's.

Japanese: そうだよ。
English: That's right.

Japanese: キレイでしょ。ミリカが 考えたんだよ、それ。
English: It's beautiful isn't it? I thought up the idea for wearing the hat.

Japanese: え？　そうなの。
English: Huh? Really?

Japanese: うん。ミリカの絵を ぼうし屋さんに持っていって、
English: Yep. He took my sketch to the hat shop...

Japanese: トクベツに作って もらったんだよ！
English: And they made a custom hat for him based off the sketch.

Japanese: 世界に１つしかない、 すごいシルクハットなんだ！
English: There is only one of these silk hats in the entire world! Isn't that cool?

Japanese: これなんだけど、 どうかな？
English: What about this? What can you tell me?

Japanese: うーん。ミリカ、 むずかしいことはニガテだな。
English: Umm... I'm not really good at figuring out hard things.

Japanese: お。ミリカちゃんも？ ‥‥話せるねえ。
English: Really? You too? I understand exactly what you mean...

Japanese: （ヘンなところで ウマが合ってしまったみたいだ）
English: (I never expected Maya to make a new friend in a strange place like this...)

Japanese: あ。マックス！ ねえ。マックスは今、どこなの？
English: It's Max!! Hey... Where is Max now anyways?

Japanese: し、知らないの？
English: Y-You don't know?

Japanese: うん。
English: Nope.

Japanese: 逮捕されたんだ。 団長さんの事件の容疑者として。
English: He's been arrested. He was charged with the murder of your father.

Japanese: だいじょうぶだよ！ あたしたちが助けてあげるから！
English: It's OK! Nick and I will help him!

Japanese: マックスじゃないよね？ ‥‥ハンニン。
English: Max isn't the guy is he? I mean... The criminal?

Japanese: も、もちろんだよ！
English: Of course he's not!

Japanese: ミリカね。 いっぱい、悩んでるの。今。
English: I'm worried about so many things right now...

Japanese: へええ‥‥。なになに？
English: Hmm... Like what?

Japanese: ふふっ‥‥。
English: *giggle*

Japanese: パパね。練習が終わったら、 すぐ部屋にもどっちゃった。
English: After practice was over, Dad went right back to his room.

Japanese: へや？
English: His room?

Japanese: うん。
English: Yes.

Japanese: そこのドアを入ったところにね、 団長室があるんだよ。
English: That door right over there leads to the Ringmaster's room.

Japanese: ふうん‥‥。
English: Hmm...

Japanese: なんかね。とても急いでたの。 どうしてかな‥‥？
English: I dunno why, but he went off to his room in a hurry. I wonder what happened?

Japanese: （団長の部屋、か‥‥。 行ってみたほうがよさそうだな）
English: (The Ringmaster's room... It's probably a good idea to check it out for myself.)

Japanese: わあ、よかった。 かわいく撮れてて。
English: Alright! I look so cute in this picture!

Japanese: かわいいでしょ？　ミリカ。 ‥‥ね？
English: Don't you think I look cute? Don't ya? Don't ya?

Japanese: カワイイよ！
